title: Real Estate Transaction Coordinator
description:
# **Admin / Transaction Coordinator (ATC) – Curative Title Real Estate (Florida Market)**



## **Overview**



We are a U.S.-based real estate investment company specializing in **curative title and probate-related transactions**. We acquire properties with title issues by working directly with property owners and heirs.



We are seeking a **detail-oriented Admin / Transaction Coordinator (ATC)** to manage files **after contracts are signed**, ensuring all documents are properly executed, tracked, and delivered to our probate attorney.



This role is a hybrid of:



* Transaction coordination

* Light probate support

* Document preparation

* Project management



This is **not a sales role**.



20 - 30 hours per week



---



## **Primary Objective**



Move signed deals from **contract ? executed documents ? attorney submission ? case tracking**, with zero errors and full visibility.



---



## **Key Responsibilities**



### **1. Seller & Heir Coordination**



* Communicate with sellers and heirs after agreements are signed

* Provide clear instructions for document signing

* Maintain a professional, respectful tone (many cases involve deceased family members)



---



### **2. Mobile Notary Coordination**



* Locate and schedule **local mobile notaries anywhere in the U.S.**



* Coordinate time, location, and document requirements



* Provide notary with:



  * Document package

  * Signing instructions

  * FedEx shipping label



* Send tracking links to sellers and monitor delivery



---



### **3. Document Preparation & Quality Control**



Prepare and review:



* Quitclaim Deeds

* Joinders

* Assignments of Interest

* Affidavits of Heirship

* ID verification (driver’s licenses)



Ensure:



* Names match exactly across all documents

* Proper vesting language

* No missing signatures, initials, or notary sections



---



### **4. Document Flow Management**



* Receive scanned documents from notary

* Review for completeness and accuracy

* Submit completed files to probate attorney

* Track original documents via FedEx



---



### **5. Case Tracking & Attorney Coordination**



* Maintain status of each deal (pipeline management)

* Communicate with probate attorney for updates

* Identify bottlenecks and follow up proactively

* Provide internal team with status updates



---



### **6. Data Entry & Research Support**



* Review obituaries and public records



* Identify possible heirs and ownership clues



* Check for:



  * Liens

  * Judgments

  * Ownership inconsistencies



* Update CRM / tracking sheets accurately



---



## **Required Skills & Experience**



### **Core Competencies**



* Extremely detail-oriented (zero-error mindset)

* Strong organizational and follow-through skills

* Excellent written and verbal English

* Ability to manage multiple files simultaneously



---



### **Technical Skills**



* Google Sheets / Excel (intermediate)

* Document handling (PDF editing, file organization)

* Familiarity with CRM systems (preferred)

* Comfortable using FedEx/UPS shipping tools



---



### **Relevant Experience (Preferred)**



* Transaction Coordinator (Real Estate)

* Title Company / Escrow Assistant

* Probate or Legal Assistant

* Virtual Assistant (real estate or legal support)



---



### **Industry Knowledge (Strongly Preferred)**



* Basic understanding of:



  * Probate process

  * Heirship / inheritance

  * Deeds and title transfers



---



## **DISC Profile – Ideal Candidate**



### **Target Profile: High C / Moderate S**



**Dominance (D): Low–Moderate (15–30%)**



* Not aggressive or pushy

* Patient and process-driven



**Influence (I): Moderate (20–40%)**



* Able to communicate clearly with sellers and heirs

* Builds trust without “selling”



**Steadiness (S): High (30–45%)**



* Consistent, reliable, calm under pressure

* Handles repetitive processes well



**Compliance (C): Very High (30–50%)**



* Precision-focused

* Follows structured processes

* Strong attention to detail



---



### **What This Role Is NOT Suited For**



* High-D, aggressive personalities (too fast, error-prone)

* High-I, talkative but disorganized candidates

* Creative types who dislike structured processes



---



## **Ideal Previous Roles (Top Fits)**



Candidates who have worked as:



1. **Real Estate Transaction Coordinator (U.S. market)**

2. **Title Company Processor / Escrow Assistant**

3. **Probate or Legal Administrative Assistant**

4. **Mortgage Processing Assistant**

5. **Document Control Specialist (high-compliance industries)**



---



## **Key Traits for Success**



* Obsessive attention to detail

* Strong follow-up habits (nothing falls through the cracks)

* Ability to think logically through ownership scenarios

* Comfortable working with sensitive family situations

* Process-oriented and checklist-driven



---



## **Performance Metrics**



* % of files completed without errors

* Turnaround time from contract ? signed documents

* Document rejection rate (attorney feedback)

* Number of files successfully moved to probate



---



## **Working Hours**



* Must overlap with U.S. business hours (Eastern Time preferred)



---



## **Why This Role Matters**



You will be the **central operator** ensuring deals actually close.

Without this role, signed contracts do not convert into revenue.



---



> To apply send an
 to 
 with the subject: Admin/Transaction Coordinator



Include:

>

> 1. A short voice recording introducing yourself

> 2. Your DISC profile (D % + I % + S % + C % = 100%) - 

> 3. A brief description of any experience with real estate or legal documents

title: Next Level YouTube Editor WANTED
description:
— WHO WE ARE —…



We are a small group of friends looking to make our mark on the YouTube landscape, with our action-packed and humorous gameplay and challenges.



Check out our channel: 



— WHAT WE‘RE LOOKING FOR —



We’re looking for remote, highly experienced Video Editors who aspire to be the best YouTube editors in the world. Period.



If hired, you will spend the majority of your time editing and animating fast-paced, highly engaging YouTube videos (our style could be compared to Game Theory, MortarMarv, or Finzar).



Our team culture is always supportive and encouraging, but you should also expect to be held to an exceptionally high standard because that’s how we become the best in the world at what we do (If you hate getting lots of revisions/feedback on your work, you won’t fit in here).



Your day-to-day will also involve analyzing previous videos' Viewer Retention Analytics Graphs to uncover opportunities to improve future edits.



— THE IDEAL CANDIDATE —



Here are the main skills and abilities we’re looking for in our applicants:



VIDEO EDITING (Required): Obviously, you must be an exceptionally talented video editor from a technical perspective. However, you must also have the passion, creativity, and sense of humor to be able to turn bland, average footage into highly engaging videos that educate AND entertain viewers.



ANIMATION (Required): You must be capable of creating high-quality 2d overlay, titling, and keyframing animations that visually illustrate the concepts we discuss in our videos.



— YOUR KPIs —



Your performance will be graded using the following KPIs:



1 Good Audience Retention, which we’ll be able to measure and learn from through our YouTube analytics.



2 The number of revisions the videos you edit require before being finalised (the less, the better)



3 The number of hours it takes you to create a video (the less, the better)



— WHAT'S IN IT FOR YOU —



Here are just some of the areas where you’ll have the opportunity to learn and grow at our channel.



STABLE & SECURE: This is a very stable and secure job. Our most senior editors have been working with us full-time for 3+ years. No more wishy-washy freelance gigs.



LEADERSHIP OPPORTUNITIES: If you prove yourself and we continue with our current growth rate, you will likely be presented with senior opportunities down the track.



LEARN FROM THE BEST IN THE WORLD: With us, you get to learn from people who are constantly striving to be the best in the world. We’re supportive and encouraging of one another, but we also hold each other to very high standards.



CREATIVE FREEDOM: Once you’ve mastered our style, we encourage outside-the-box thinking. We’re always open to experimenting with new techniques and styles, and then we analyze the data to see how viewers react.



FLEXIBLE WORK HOURS: You can work whenever you want within reason; however, we expect you to be available for tea
etings (We are based in California, and tea
etings are usually in the late evening PT).



— TO APPLY —



If you're interested, please submit the following form (No need for a CV or cover letter. It’s not the 1900s anymore :D):






Please note: All successful job applications will start with a virtual interview and trial project/s to make sure that we’re the right fit for each other.



Thank you for your consideration, and best of luck on your job search!

title: Senior Xero Bookkeeper / Finance Operator (AU Business)
description:
Senior Xero Bookkeeper / Finance Operator (AU Business | Full Ownership)



We are a fast-growing Australian healthcare business looking for a highly capable Xero expert to take full ownership of our finance function. This is not a basic bookkeeping role.



We need someone who can:



clean up and stabilise our Xero file

own day-to-day finance operations

ensure everything is accurate, up-to-date, and ready for our accountant



What you’ll be responsible for



Full ownership of Xero (reconciliations, accuracy, structure)

Cleaning up historical data and resolving discrepancies

Managing accounts payable and receivable

Payroll processing and ensuring compliance (AU)

Preparing BAS/IAS ready for lodgement

Supporting cashflow visibility and basic reporting

Working closely with our external accountant



What we’re looking for



You must:

Have strong Xero experience (non-negotiable)

Have worked with Australian businesses (BAS, payroll, super, payroll, compliance)

Be able to clean up messy accounts and fix issues independently

Be detail-obsessed — you notice discrepancies immediately

Be reliable, proactive, and able to work without constant direction



This role is NOT for you if:



You need step-by-step instructions

You’ve only done basic data entry

You don’t understand Australian compliance requirements

You avoid problem-solving or complex clean-up work



What success looks like



Clean, accurate Xero file

No outstanding reconciliation issues

Clear visibility of financial position

Accountant can step in seamlessly



Role structure



Initial 4-week full-time clean-up phase

Then transition into ongoing bookkeeping role (part-time or full-time depending on workload)



Compensation



Competitive hourly rate based on experience

Long-term opportunity for the right person



To apply



Please include:



A short Loom video (2–3 mins) answering:

A messy Xero file — where do you start?

How do you ensure accuracy in reconciliations?

Your experience with BAS / IAS preparation and super lodgment in Australia

Your hourly rate



Applications without an introductory video will not be considered.

title: Safety, HR, VA, web design, Powerpoint, SAP systems
description:
Join Second Wind Renewables – Your Opportunity to Make a Difference in Renewable Energy!



Are you looking for a role where you can combine your skills with a passion for innovation? At Second Wind Renewables, we’re a leading wind turbine service company seeking an enthusiastic, driven, and detail-oriented individual to join our team. If you have experience in industries like renewable energy, oil & gas, mining, civil works, or similar fields, we’d love to hear from you!



What We’re Looking For:

HR Expertise: Manage and coordinate HR tasks efficiently.

Safety Knowledge: Help maintain and improve our strong safety culture.

SAP System Proficiency: Hands-on experience with SAP or similar systems is highly valued.

VA Skills (Optional): Experience in Virtual Assistance or administrative tasks is a bonus!

Why Work With Us?

Flexible Working Options: Suitable for both part-time and full-time engagement.

Dynamic Work Environment: Be part of a team dedicated to renewable energy solutions.

Room to Grow: Bring your ideas and drive, and grow with our company as we expand.

Who You Are:

Committed to delivering high-quality work and meeting deadlines.

If you’re passionate about supporting a business that makes a difference in renewable energy and thrive in a flexible, collaborative environment, reach out today! We’re excited to discuss how you can contribute to our mission.

title: Amazon Va
description:
Job Title

Virtual Assistant – Amazon Store Administrator

Job Description

We are looking for a reliable Virtual Assistant (VA) to help manage and grow our Amazon store. The VA will assist with product management, supplier communication, inventory monitoring, and preparing shipments to Amazon FBA.

This is a great opportunity for someone who is organized, detail-oriented, and experienced in e-commerce.

Responsibilities

• Manage and maintain the online store

• Add and optimize product listings

• Upload product images and descriptions

• Contact suppliers and request product catalogs

• Monitor product inventory levels

• Prepare products for Amazon FBA shipments

• Create shipping plans in Amazon Seller Central

• Research profitable products to sell

• Track shipments and orders

• Maintain product spreadsheets and reports

• Assist with customer messages if needed

Requirements

• Experience with Amazon Seller Central

• Strong English communication skills

• Knowledge of product sourcing and supplier communication

• Ability to follow instructions carefully

• Familiarity with Google Sheets or Excel

Preferred Skills

• Experience with Amazon FBA

• Product research experience

• Knowledge of tools like Keepa, Helium10, or Jungle Scout

Work Details

• Remote work

• Flexible hours

• Long-term opportunity

• Weekly reports required

Please include the word "STORE PRO" in your application so we know you read the full description.

title: Expert Cold Email Deliverability and Outreach Specialist Needed for B2B Launch
description:
Expert Cold
 Deliverability and Outreach Specialist Needed for B2B Launch



Job Description:

We are looking for a true expert in cold
 outreach and deliverability to help us set up a professional B2B
 system for a new product launch.



This is not an entry-level role. We are specifically looking for someone who really knows what they are doing and has real hands-on experience with cold
 infrastructure, domain setup, inbox placement, deliverability, and outreach strategy.



We are launching a B2B campaign targeting businesses across the USA, including hotels, retirement homes, and property management-related contacts. We already have a large list of leads, and we need an expert who can help us build the right system the correct way from the beginning.



This role will start on a gig basis, a few hours here and there as needed, but it has strong potential to grow into longer-term steady work for the right person.



What we need help with:



Setting up a cold
 system properly from the ground up

Advising on and helping set up secondary or burner domains for outreach

Protecting our main domain reputation

Setting up
 accounts and the right sending structure

SPF, DKIM, DMARC, and other deliverability essentials

 warm-up strategy and inbox placement

Making sure
s are sent in a way that avoids spam as much as possible

Advising on best practices for outreach campaigns

Helping with formatting and
 structure, including images, video links, and other elements when appropriate

Recommending the best tools, systems, and setup for long-term success



What we’re looking for:



Expert-level experience in cold
 outreach and deliverability

Strong understanding of domain reputation,
 authentication, and inboxing

Experience setting up outreach systems using separate domains

Ability to explain clearly what should and should not be done

Strong knowledge of best practices for B2B cold
 campaigns

Organized, dependable, and able to work independently

Available for Zoom calls and strategy sessions as needed



Again, this is not for beginners. We are looking for someone who is highly experienced and confident in this area, someone who understands the real technical side of cold
 and knows how to build a safe and effective outreach system the right way.



Opportunity:

Many people on our team started with us on a gig basis and later moved into more steady roles. This position could grow into something long-term for the right person and become a reliable source of ongoing income.



To apply:

Please send your resume, portfolio, or a short summary of your experience with cold
 outreach and deliverability. Please also include examples of systems you have set up, tools you have used, and results you have achieved if possible.



Also, please let us know your desired pay.



God bless,

Eric

title: Short-Form Video Editor — Cinematic AI Instagram/TikTok
description:
JOB TITLE: Short-Form Video Editor — Cinematic AI Instagram/TikTok

SALARY: $800–1,100 USD/month (based on portfolio/skills)

TYPE: Full-time (40 hours/week), Remote (Philippines)

SCHEDULE: Async, with Vancouver (PST) overlap for feedback



---



THE VISION



Prismiera - luxury jewelry.



We're going to be building cinematic para-social content on Instagram/TikTok, with flexibility to pivot formats based on what the platform is rewarding. Realistic, stylized, dark feminine aesthetic, mythology underneath, luxury fashion on the surface. Think if a high-end fashion editorial had lore and a storyline.



The content follows a simple rhythm: our heroine talks to camera like a real person — casual, smart, magnetic — then something cinematic happens that changes everything you just saw. The audience replays it.



We're hiring for taste first, artistry, cinematography, humor, and technical execution. We provide all AI tools and training if needed. You bring the instinct.



THE CONTENT MIX



65% VIBE & SCENARIO — The reel a woman sends to her group chat with no caption.

25% CINEMATIC SKITS — High-end execution of viral formats and humor. The premise can be unhinged; the visuals never break luxury canon.

10% SENSORY / EXPERIMENTAL — Layered, fast, loop-optimized. The algorithmic wildcard.



THE STYLE



YES: Aspirational. Lethal elegance. Fashion-edit energy. Dark femininity. Music-driven impact. Cinematic skits.



NO: Generic CapCut presets. Generic motivational reels. Anything made in Canva.



You instinctively know the difference between "luxury" and "cheap." Between powerful and loud. That instinct is what we're hiring for.



---



WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Produce original IG Reels and TikToks — parasocial content into cinematic reveal

- Build cinematic skits around our AI personas using trending formats and dark humor

- Integrate AI-generated characters into edits so they feel like they belong in the scene, not pasted on top

- Learn and use frontier AI generation tools (we provide paid accounts + training if needed)

- Music-sync editing — cuts married to the beat, rhythm as a storytelling weapon

- Design for platform behavior — what gets saved on IG, what loops on TikTok

- Ramp from 3–5 pieces/week to 6–10 at steady state



REQUIREMENTS



- Portfolio that makes us stop scrolling — we're evaluating taste, creative vision, and editing execution as a package. All three matter.

- Music-sync editing instinct (AMVs, fashion reels, phonk edits, fan edits — any genre)

- Work that has atmospheric, cinematic depth — layered compositions, light/shadow awareness, visual storytelling that goes beyond straight cuts and generic Capcut presets. Whether you achieve this in After Effects, Premiere, DaVinci, or anything else doesn't matter. The output is everything.

- Strong English, clear async communication, reliable deadlines

- Coachable — takes direct feedback and iterates fast



BONUS (affects your rate): After Effects proficiency, AI generation experience (Kling, Veo, Seedream), color grading, typography, sound design



---



HOW THIS ROLE FITS



Other editors handle cinematic YouTube production — you own social media. Same mythology, same brand, different platform behavior. Each editor has a distinct lane, and yours is how Prismiera looks and feels on Instagram and TikTok.



---



SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS



RAM: 16GB minimum (32GB preferred) + SSD

Reliable high-speed internet (upload speed matters)

Must run your editing software and browser-based AI tools simultaneously



---



THE DEAL



- Paid trial: $150/week standard. For candidates with strong existing signal, we may run a shorter 2-day trial at $100 for a single deliverable.

- All AI tool subscriptions provided

- Creative ownership from day one — you define how a luxury brand looks on social

- Direct feedback on every edit

- Rate growth tied to capability growth

- A brand worth building — Prismiera launches soon, with two more AI-native brands incubating behind it



COMPENSATION: $800–1,100 USD/month based on portfolio and skills. Editors with compositing ability and AI generation experience start higher. Bi-weekly payments after confirmed hire.



---



OWNERSHIP & CONFIDENTIALITY



All outputs (edits, project files, prompts, generated assets, persona visuals) are Prismiera property and must remain confidential.



---



HOW TO APPLY



Subject line: PRISMIERA SOCIAL — [Your favorite movie]

Use 7+ apply points.



1. The Vibe Test. Link to ONE edit that is aspirational, aesthetic, fashion-adjacent, or a skit showing platform-native instinct. The feeling and execution matters.



2. The Rhythm Test. Link to ONE music-driven edit. (Can overlap with #1.)



3. Portfolio link (optional). If you have a reel, channel, or portfolio beyond the two links above that you are proud of, drop it here!



4. The Two-Act Test (3–5 sentences total). You're given footage of our AI heroine sitting in a dimly lit restaurant, a dark atmospheric beat, and her voice talking casually about something she noticed about the people around her. Act 1 is the conversation. Act 2 is the cinematic reveal. Pitch both halves — what does she say, what does the audience see, and what is the reveal? Humorous? Epic?



5. AI Experience (1–2 sentences). Your experience with generative AI tools. If none, let us know.



6. Hardware. CPU / GPU / RAM / upload speed.



7. Turnaround. Given existing footage, potential music track, and an established template — how long for a 15–20s piece? How long for a 45s stitched cinematic AI video?



8. The Rewrite. Make this dark, powerful, and aspirational: "She is really cool and strong and she wins."

title: Junior React Native Developer (Part-Time, Long-Term Growth Role)
description:
About Sprout Network



Sprout Network is a fast-growing mobile app focused on building a large-scale digital ecosystem with long-term blockchain ambitions. We are currently focused on strengthening and expanding our live mobile application while continuing development toward future infrastructure goals.



Our app currently has:



500,000+ total downloads



70,000+ daily active users



10,000+ reviews on the Google Play Store



You will be working on a real production app with real users at scale.



We are looking for a junior developer who wants to grow long-term with the company. This is not a short-term freelance gig. This is a growth position with clear pay increases based on performance and independence.



Position Details



Role: Junior React Native Developer

Type: Part-Time

Hours: 25 hours per week

Schedule: 5 hours per day, Monday – Thursday

Time Zone Requirement: Must work within 5:00 AM – 1:00 PM EST

(Your exact 5-hour shift will be chosen within this window upon hiring)



This role has strong potential to become full-time in the future.



We hold:



A start-of-week meeting every Monday



An end-of-week meeting every Thursday



Clear communication and reliability are extremely important.



Compensation



Starting Pay: $5.25 per hour



100 hours per month



$525 per month to start



Paid biweekly



Once you are able to independently work inside the app without heavy supervision:



Your pay increases to $7.00 per hour



After that, you receive a $0.25 raise every month



There is no salary cap. This position rewards developers who prove themselves and stay long term.



If you are looking for a stable growth plan where performance directly increases your income, this is for you.



What You’ll Be Working On



You will work directly with our lead developer and assist with:



Feature development in a live production app



Bug fixes and edge case handling



Improving UI components



Supporting earning logic and timer systems



Assisting with referral logic and data consistency



Helping maintain ad flow integrations



Supporting internal tools when needed



Tech Stack

Mobile



React Native



Expo



Firebase (Auth, Firestore)



Google & Apple Sign-In



AdMob (rewarded ads + banner flows)



Web / Internal Tools



Next.js



Tailwind CSS



General



Git / GitHub



Clean component architecture



Clear error handling



Proper state management



Required Skills



React Native (Expo experience required)



Firebase (Firestore + Auth)



Ability to work inside an existing codebase



Git version control



Solid English communication (clear updates and explanations)



Ability to follow direction and collaborate with a lead developer



Who This Is For



This is for someone who:



Wants long-term stability



Wants raises based on real performance



Is coachable and eager to grow



Takes pride in writing clean code



Wants to work on an app with real scale



We care more about your willingness to grow and communicate clearly than being a senior expert.



How To Apply



Please include:



Links to your GitHub or React Native projects



A short explanation of your experience with Firebase



Confirmation that you can work within the required EST time range



Your internet speed (upload and download)



The word “SproutGrowth” in your application subject line



Applications that do not follow instructions will not be reviewed

title: Advertising Manager
description:
We are looking to hire a Paid Advertising Specialist to help grow our mobile app through effective paid marketing campaigns.



Your primary responsibility will be creating ad content, launching and managing
 and Google ad campaigns, analyzing performance, and continuously optimizing for user growth.



The app itself will be disclosed during the interview process.



This role is performance-driven and ideal for someone who wants to build long-term career growth with a fast-moving team.





Responsibilities



-Create ad creatives (copy, images, concepts) for paid campaigns

-Launch, manage, and optimize
 Ads and Google Ads

-Test different creatives, audiences, and campaign structures

-Analyze campaign performance (CPC, CPI, ROAS, conversions, etc.)

-Identify what is working and scale effective campaigns

-Identify what is not working and iterate quickly

-Plan advertising strategies focused on mobile app user acquisition

-Track results and report performance clearly

-Continuously learn and improve campaign effectiveness





Requirements



-At least 1+ year of experience running paid marketing campaigns

-Hands-on experience with
 Ads Manager and Google Ads

-Experience creating marketing content specifically for ads

-Strong understanding of campaign testing and optimization

-Willingness to receive constructive criticism and improve

-Strong work ethic and desire to grow skills and income

-Team-oriented mindset with long-term commitment

-Experience with mobile app marketing is a strong plus

-Knowledge of crypto or blockchain is a plus, not required

-Success in this role will be measured by cost-per-install (CPI), user retention, and campaign scalability.





Schedule:



-8 hours per day, Monday–Friday

-Must be able to work on a U.S. Eastern Time schedule

-Preferred schedule: 6:00 PM – 2:00 AM Philippine Time (PHT)

-Some flexibility is possible, but Eastern Time overlap is required





Compensation & Growth:



-Starting pay: $4.85 per hour

-Probationary period: 2 months

-After probation, you will receive a $0.25/hour raise every 2 months, provided performance and reliability standards are met



After 6 months, you will receive:



-Health insurance

-Paid time off (PTO)





Performance bonuses based on:



-Campaign results

-Number of users acquired

-Overall contribution to growth



This is a long-term role. Tea
mbers who stay with us, perform well, and take the role seriously can build a real career and earn significantly more over time.





You must be proficient in:




 Ads Manager

-Google Ads

-Google Analytics / Firebase (if applicable)

-Basic spreadsheets (Google Sheets / Excel)



How to Apply:



Please include the following in your application:



1. Why you believe you are a good fit for this role

2. Your level of experience with
 Ads and Google Ads

3. Examples of campaigns you have worked on (screenshots or descriptions)

4. Any experience with mobile apps or crypto, if applicable



To prove that you read this entire message comment "ADVERTISE" at the start of your application.

title: Digital Marketing and SEO Coordinator
description:
We run a growing home care company focused on helping seniors live safely and independently in their own homes. Our business depends on consistent, measurable results—not trends, not vanity metrics.



We are hiring a full-time SEO & Digital Marketing Specialist to work directly with our internal team.

This is a direct hire position (not an agency role).



You will be part of our long-term operation and expected to execute, improve, and take ownership of results.



If you are looking for short-term work, multiple clients, or passive tasks—this is not a fit.



What You Will Own



Your primary responsibility is simple:



???? Increase qualified inbound phone calls and inquiries



You will do this through:



Website Management & Optimization



Update and improve website content (WordPress or similar)

Improve site speed, mobile performance, and basic UX

Fix technical SEO issues (indexing, structure, broken links)



Local SEO Execution



Keyword research based on intent (calls, not traffic)

On-page optimization and internal linking

Improve rankings that lead to real inquiries



Landing Pages & Conversion



Build and improve service pages for local markets

Optimize pages based on performance (not guesswork)



Google Business Profile Management



Ongoing posts, photos, and updates

Review monitoring and responses

Track calls, clicks, and direction requests



Call-Driven Marketing Support



Improve landing pages and ad performance

Use call tracking data to identify lead quality

Adjust messaging based on real conversations



Reporting & Accountability



Weekly reporting on:

Calls generated

Inquiry volume

SEO performance

GBP activity

Clear breakdown of:

What is working

What is not working

What needs to change

What We Value

You focus on results, not activity

You understand that traffic without conversion is useless

You execute without needing constant supervision

You think in systems and repeatable processes

You are comfortable being measured on real outcomes

Required Experience

WordPress (or similar CMS)

Local SEO and Google Business Profiles

Google Analytics & Search Console

SEO tools (Ahrefs, SEMrush, or similar)

Experience with call tracking or lead tracking

This Role Is NOT For You If

You mainly do social media posting

You rely on backlinks, spam tactics, or shortcuts

You focus on impressions, likes, or traffic alone

You prefer strategy discussions over actual execution

Role Structure

Full-time remote position

Direct hire (no agencies, no outsourcing teams)

Long-term opportunity with growth based on performance

Application Process (Strict)



We are looking for people who follow instructions and can execute.



Step 1 – Initial Application



Send:



A short summary of your experience

At least 2 examples of:

Websites you’ve worked on

Google Business Profiles you’ve managed

SEO results tied to calls or leads

Answer this (max 5 sentences):

How would you increase phone calls for a local home care business?

List the tools you use regularly

Confirm:

???? You are applying as an individual (not an agency)

Include the word Neptune in your subject line

Step 2 – Paid Test Task



Selected applicants will be invited to complete a paid test task ($10).



This is a short, real-world assignment (1–2 hours max), not busywork.



Example of what you may be asked to do:



Review a service page and identify improvements

Suggest SEO and conversion fixes

Rewrite a section of content

Provide a short, practical action plan



We use this step to evaluate:



How you think

How you execute

Whether you focus on real outcomes (calls, not just traffic)



All test tasks are paid.

We do not request free work.



Final Note



We are building a long-term, stable marketing system.

We are not looking for hacks, shortcuts, or inflated metrics.



If you take ownership, execute consistently, and focus on real results, this role will grow with you.

title: Annotations Ops Manager (Video Data)
description:
VisionLab is building the data layer for physical AI by capturing and structuring real-world industrial workflows using video and SOP-level process knowledge. We are looking for an AI Data Operations Manager to own and scale our annotation pipeline end-to-end.



You will be responsible for recruiting and managing annotators, designing onboarding and training programs, and overseeing daily annotation operations to ensure high-quality outputs. This includes managing throughput, meeting SLAs, and coordinating across annotators, QA reviewers, and internal teams. A key part of the role is building and maintaining strong quality control systems, including multi-layer review, sampling strategies, and accuracy tracking, to consistently achieve high annotation accuracy (?95%). You will also track performance metrics (throughput, accuracy, cost) and continuously improve efficiency through better processes, tooling, and incentive structures.



Requirements: at least 2 years of experience managing annotation or labeling projects (video preferred), prior experience managing teams, and familiarity with tools such as CVAT, Label Studio, or similar annotations tool. Strong understanding of quality control workflows is required. Experience in computer vision, multimodal data, or companies such as Scale AI, Appen, Surge AI, TELUS, or similar is a strong plus.

title: YouTube Video Editor Needed for Entrepreneur/Dropshipping Channel (2 Videos/Week)
description:
I am an entrepreneur running a successful dropshipping business, and I am launching a YouTube channel to document my journey and share what I’ve learned. I have high-quality raw footage (shot on a DJI camera) and I am looking for a talented, reliable Video Editor to take full ownership of the editing process.



My goal is to post 2 videos per week:



1.

One Lifestyle/Vlog Video: Documenting my daily life, driving, working, and the reality of running a business.



2.

One Educational/Talking-Head Video: Sharing specific dropshipping strategies, business lessons, and advice.



What You Will Do:



•

Take raw footage (often 20+ minutes of unedited video) and cut it down into an engaging, polished 8–15 minute YouTube video.



•

Adapt your editing style to fit the video type (e.g., fast-paced and narrative-driven for vlogs; clean, structured, and visually supported for educational videos).



•

Add engaging elements: background music, sound effects, text overlays, B-roll, and smooth transitions to maximize viewer retention.



•

Perform basic color grading and audio enhancement to ensure a professional look and sound.



•

Work independently. I will upload the raw footage to Google Drive, and I need you to find the story, make the cuts, and deliver a finished product.



What I Am Looking For:



•

Proven experience editing YouTube videos, specifically in the entrepreneurship, business, or lifestyle vlog niches.



•

Proficiency in professional editing software (Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve).



•

A strong understanding of YouTube pacing, retention strategies, and storytelling.



•

Someone who is proactive and requires minimal hand-holding. I want to focus on filming; you focus on making it look great.



Budget & Workflow:



•

The starting salary is $500/month for part-time work (approx. 2 videos per week). There is room for this to grow into a full-time role with higher pay as the channel grows.



•

We will use Google Drive for file sharing.



How to Apply:

Please send a message through OnlineJobs.ph with the following:



1.

A link to your portfolio, YouTube channel, or a Google Drive folder with your work.



2.

Specifically: 1 link to a vlog-style video you’ve edited, and 1 link to an educational/talking-head video you’ve edited.



3.

Your typical turnaround time for a 10-minute video.



Applications without relevant portfolio links will not be considered.



WAGE/SALARY



500 month



DESIRED NO. OF HOURS PER WEEK



10-20

title: Video Editor (E-commerce, Meta Ads)
description:
###About Us

We're an e-commerce company selling physical products in Europe — mostly in Poland, but expanding into other markets. We've done over $1M in total sales and we're still growing.

Our products are for women and men aged 35–45+. Things that solve real problems people deal with every day. We keep our product range small on purpose — a few carefully picked products and stores, and we put everything into making them work through strong creative.

The team is small. Everyone here has a real impact on results.



###The Role

We're hiring a full-time Video Editor (8 hours/day) to create video ads that stop the scroll and drive sales — for Meta only. No TikTok, no YouTube, nothing else.

You'll work with us directly. We take care of strategy — we'll give you scripts, creative direction, video clips for hooks, and access to footage library and ai tools. Your job is to bring those scripts to life: find the right footage, edit it into a finished ad, and make sure every second counts.

After each ad you finish, you'll get a short review from us — what we liked, what to change, and why. You'll always know where you stand.



###What You'll Be Making

 • Brand voice ads (1–2 minutes) — built to look and feel like real customer content — voiceover + footage or AI UGC format

 • Hook swaps — take a winning ad and swap out the first few seconds to create new test versions. We do 3 hooks per 1 hold

 • Testimonial-style ads — designed to feel like genuine customer content — either voiceover-driven or AI UGC avatars



###What Are Your Responsibilities

 • Edit ad concepts from script to final version — quality over quantity, always. If a solid 2-minute ad takes two days, that's fine. We'd rather have something great than something rushed

 • Source footage online to match the script

 • Add captions and subtitles to all videos

 • Add background music that fits

 • Generate AI voiceovers with ElevenLabs

 • Create AI UGC avatars

 • Generate AI video clips when needed

 • Send a short daily update — what you worked on and where things are



###What We Need

 • Real experience editing e-commerce video ads that actually convert — a few years is great, but even a few months is fine if your work speaks for itself

 • A good feel for what makes content look authentic, engaging, and hard to scroll past

 • Experience with ElevenLabs or similar AI voiceover tools

 • Familiarity with AI avatar and video generation tools — we'll give you access to everything you'll need

 • You can find the footage and put together ads where the visuals and script feel natural together

 • Communicative English

 • Reliable and independent — you don't need someone looking over your shoulder



###Nice to Have

 • Experience making ads in Polish



###What We Offer

 • $1,000–2,000 USD/month depending on experience. Your pay grows as results grow — we don't keep salaries flat when the brand is scaling

 • 13th month pay after working together for a while

 • Performance bonuses when the work is exceptional

 • Full-time, 8 hours/day — work whatever hours suit you, no European timezone overlap needed

 • No screen recording, no time tracking — we trust you. Just keep us updated daily

 • We provide all tools subscriptions you need to create better ads

 • Proper onboarding from day one — we'll walk you through our process, tools, and what good work looks like for us

 • This is a long-term thing — we're not looking for a freelancer, we want someone to grow with



###How to Apply

Send us a message about yourself and your experience.

A short Loom video (a few minutes) is optional — but if you're comfortable doing one, we'd love to see it. It's the easiest way to show us who you are and how you think about editing ads.

If you're open to doing a quick sample task — one hook and one hold from a script we give you — that's the fastest way to stand out and move straight to an offer.



If you'd rather skip the sample, that's okay too. If your portfolio is strong enough, we'll go straight into a short paid trial (about two weeks) to see if we're a good fit for each other.



We work with people, not just output. If something isn't working for you — tell us.

title: CREATIVE STRATEGIST — In-house · Full-time · Remote
description:
Who We Are



Rogier’s Ecom Fzco is a fast-moving direct-to-consumer e-commerce company operating multiple brands across Europe, the US, and beyond. We run paid media at scale across Meta, Google, and Pinterest — and we’re building the creative engine that keeps us ahead.



We don’t do slow. We test fast, kill fast, and scale what wins.



The Role



We’re hiring a Creative Strategist to sit directly alongside our Media Buyer and turn winning data into winning creatives — consistently, month over month.



You’re not just making content. You’re studying the market, identifying what stops the scroll, and building ad concepts that convert cold traffic into buyers. You understand that a great visual without a great hook is worthless — and you obsess over both.



What You’ll Do



Daily



? Study winning and losing ads across our brands — understand why they perform



? Fill 2-8 ad briefs per day with content, angles, and visual direction



? Work directly with the Media Buyer to align creative output with what’s working in market



? Review produced creatives inside our CRM and ensure briefs are executed correctly



? Iterate fast on losing concepts — no ego, only data



Weekly



? Perform in-depth market and competitor research



? Attend Monday creative sync — review winners, losers, and new angles



? Deliver new creative batch before Wednesday every week



? Keep 2-5 fresh concepts per winning product in the pipeline at all times



Ongoing



? Source and qualify content creators for UGC generation



? Manage content pipelines to ensure we never run dry on assets



? Build and maintain a creative asset library per brand



? Attend weekly team calls and contribute new ideas proactively



What We’re Looking For



Must-haves



? Minimum 1 year creating or strategizing ads for DTC e-commerce brands



? Proven understanding of direct response — hooks, angles, scroll-stopping formats



? You can write copy AND direct visuals — not one or the other



? Fluent English — written and spoken



? You’ve worked inside a fast-paced remote team before



Character



? You watch ads the way others watch Netflix — obsessively



? Data doesn’t intimidate you — it excites you



? You take feedback without ego and iterate without being asked



? Highly organized, punctual, strong attention to detail



? Coachable and hungry to grow



This Is NOT For You If:



? You need hand-holding to produce work



? You don’t understand e-commerce or paid media



? You’re not obsessed with what makes people buy



? You can’t handle a fast, high-output environment



? You think creativity is just aesthetics



What You Get



? $2,500/month — fully remote



? Work directly with a senior media buyer and see results of your work in real numbers



? Fast-growing multi-brand portfolio — your work scales across multiple markets



? High-performance culture — results are rewarded

title: Senior Make.com / n8n Automation Developer for AI Email + CRM + Slack System
description:
We are a reputation management company



We already have our outbound cold
 engine running. This role is for building the next layer: an AI-powered reply-handling and follow-up automation system for interested prospects.



This is not a beginner automation job.



I am looking for someone who can take a detailed build spec and turn it into a clean, reliable, production-ready system with minimal hand-holding.



Project Structure



This role is structured in 3 phases:



Phase 1: Fixed-Price Build



You will build the initial system based on an existing detailed specification.



Fixed project payment: 50,000 PHP



Phase 2: Paid Maintenance / Optimization



After launch, I want the same person to continue maintaining, improving, debugging, and optimizing the system as needed.



This will be a separate paid arrangement after the build is complete.



Phase 3: Long-Term Role



If you are strong, fast, reliable, and easy to work with, this can turn into an ongoing role building and maintaining additional automations across the business.



I do not want a one-off freelancer if I find the right person. I want someone who can become the go-to technical builder for future systems.



What You’ll Be Building



You will build an automation system that does things like:



Pull interested prospect replies from Instantly.ai

Fetch the full
 thread

Send thread context + business/review data to Claude

Route responses based on logic:

auto-send

hold for VA review in Slack

escalate to founder

Send replies through Instantly while preserving thread and sender persona

Send SMS follow-up after

Update GoHighLevel pipeline, tags, and custom fields

Trigger stage-specific follow-ups when a prospect goes cold

Create Slack approval workflows with approve / edit / reject actions

Support a phased rollout from semi-automated to more fully automated

Be structured cleanly so future automations can be added without rebuilding everything

Platforms / Skills Needed



You should already be experienced with most or all of these:




 and/or n8n

APIs / webhooks / HTTP requests

Claude / Anthropic API

Instantly.ai

GoHighLevel

Slack integrations

Router logic / parsing / error handling

CRM workflow automation

SMS integrations

Who This Is For



You are a fit if:



You are a real automation builder, not just a general VA

You have built multi-step systems with APIs, logic branches, and approval flows

You can think through edge cases before they become problems

You can move fast and still build cleanly

You communicate clearly

You can work independently

You know how to debug without getting lost

Who This Is NOT For



This is not for you if:



You only know basic Zapier-level automation

You need constant step-by-step technical guidance

You have never worked directly with APIs / webhooks / JSON / routing logic

You cannot explain how your systems work

You are slow to execute and slow to communicate

You disappear when something gets difficult

Speed Matters



This project needs to move quickly.



I care about clean execution, but speed is also important. I am looking for someone who can build with urgency, communicate blockers early, and keep 
ntum without sacrificing reliability.



I do not expect perfection on day 1. I do expect strong judgment, proactive communication, and steady progress.



If you are the type who drags projects out unnecessarily, this will not be a fit.



Timeline



I am looking for someone who can begin quickly and deliver the first working version fast.



A strong builder should be able to make meaningful progress immediately and get this built in a reasonable timeframe.



When you apply, tell me your realistic timeline to complete v1 properly.



Long-Term Opportunity



This is important:



If you perform well on this build, I want to keep working with you.



We have additional automation opportunities beyond this system. The right person can become the ongoing automation lead for the business through paid maintenance, upgrades, new workflows, and future builds.



To Apply



Do not send a generic application.



Start your application with:



READY TO BUILD



Then answer every question below carefully.



Applications that ignore instructions will not be considered.



Screening Questions

What is the most advanced automation system you have personally built? Explain the workflow clearly.

Which of these have you used directly: 
, n8n, Claude API, Instantly.ai, GoHighLevel, Slack API, SMS workflows?

Have you built approval-based workflows before where someone can approve, edit, or reject inside Slack or another interface? Explain.

How would you prevent duplicate webhook processing in a system like this?

If AI output fails parsing or returns bad structure, how would you handle that safely?

If you were building this project, what parts would you build first and why?

What part of this system is most likely to break if built poorly?

How would you structure this so future automations can be added without rebuilding the whole thing?

How fast could you realistically deliver a strong v1?

After launch, would you be open to a separate paid maintenance role plus future builds?

Send 2-3 examples, screenshots, Looms, or short explanations of similar work you have done.

What is your preferred setup for the build fee and then ongoing maintenance after launch?

Final Instruction



Write the word BLUEPRINT at the very end of your application.

title: Urgent Hiring Experienced Bookeeper(Manila Based Candidates Only)
description:
We are looking for an experienced Bookeeper to join our growing team.



The Role Overview



The successful candidate will play a key role in maintaining accurate financial records for a portfolio of clients. You will work closely with our accounting team in Ireland to ensure that bookkeeping tasks are completed accurately, efficiently, and in line with Irish and UK accounting standards.



This is an excellent opportunity for a highly organised professional who enjoys structured work, problem solving, and delivering high-quality financial information.

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

• Processing and posting purchase invoices and supplier payments

• Bank and credit card reconciliations

• Maintaining accurate purchase and sales ledgers

• Preparing bookkeeping schedules to support monthly management accounts

• Supporting VAT return preparation and reconciliation

• Investigating and resolving reconciliation differences

• Maintaining organised and well-documented financial records

• Communicating with internal teams regarding queries or missing information

• Supporting process improvements and workflow efficiencies

________________________________________

Key Skills & Experience



Technical Skills

-Strong understanding of double-entry bookkeeping (debits and credits)

-Excellent attention to detail and accuracy

-Experience with bank reconciliations and ledger management

-Good exposure to VAT processes

-Experience with accounting software such as:

o Xero

o QuickBooks Online

o Sage (desirable)

o Dext (desirable)



Professional Skills

Highly developed organisational skills

Strong time management and deadline management

Ability to prioritise tasks and manage multiple client workloads

Methodical and structured approach to completing work

Flexible and adaptable to changing priorities

Strong written and verbal communication skills

Excellent English language skills



Additional Requirements

-Understanding of Irish or UK business practices is highly desirable

-Ability to work effectively within a remote international team

-A proactive mindset with a strong sense of responsibility for work quality

-Currently residing in around Greater Manila area 

________________________________________

What We Offer

-Opportunity to join a growing international finance outsourcing firm

-A chance to become part of a pioneering Manila-based team

-Direct support and mentoring from our Ireland head office

-Ongoing training and professional development

-Opportunities for career progression and promotion as the team expands

-A collaborative and supportive team environment

-Stable weekday working hours (11 AM – 7 PM) with weekends off

________________________________________

Who This Role Would Suit



This role is ideal for an experienced bookkeeper who enjoys structured financial work, takes pride in accuracy, and wants to be part of a growing international finance team.



You will thrive in this position if you are detail-oriented, reliable, organised, and committed to producing high-quality financial records.

title: Virtual Patient Care Coordinator
description:
We are seeking a highly professional, confident, and tech-savvy Virtual Patient Care Coordinator to serve as the virtual front desk and operational anchor of the clinic.



This is not a basic administrative role—you will be the voice, presence, and flow manager of the clinic during treatment hours while also supporting backend systems and patient engagement outside of clinic hours. Your communication skills, organization, and composure will directly impact both the patient experience and clinic growth.



This is a long-term opportunity for someone who wants to grow with a mission-driven healthcare practice.



Your Role

You will operate as the clinic’s virtual front desk during live treatment hours, ensuring seamless communication, accurate documentation, and consistent patient follow-up.



You must be confident on the phone, able to guide conversations toward booking consultations, and maintain professionalism and authority without discussing pricing or insurance details.



Core Responsibilities



Live Clinic Support (Real-Time)

* Join live during clinic hours via FaceTime or designated platform

* Answer incoming calls with warmth, confidence, and professionalism

* Guide prospective patients toward booking consultations

* Monitor reception camera feed to track patient arrivals and flow

* Support virtual patient check-in process

* Collect patient updates and log into workflow tracker (Google Sheets)

* Transfer patient information into EHR (OptiMantra) using templates

* Generate superbills and create invoices

* Track visit packages and session usage

* Prepare and send Good Faith Estimates

* Communicate with patients via phone,
, and Google Voice



Patient Follow-Up & Retention

* Follow up with consultation leads who did not convert

* Re-engage patients who have paused or dropped off care

* Conduct outreach campaigns during designated periods

* Maintain rapport and continuity with active patients



Administrative & Systems Support

* Maintain accurate and organized electronic health records (OptiMantra)

* Track daily patient workflow using Google Workspace

* Support light billing (invoices, payment plans, superbills)

* Ensure documentation accuracy and completeness

* Maintain HIPAA compliance (training provided)

* Keep systems, files, and processes organized and up to date



Off-Hour / Flexible Tasks

* Return missed calls (30–60 minutes daily as needed)

* Schedule and post social media content (Canva + OneUp)

* Make light edits to pre-developed content

* Assist with additional admin or marketing initiatives as the clinic grows



Tools & Platforms Requires

Hubstaff, Google Workspace (Drive, Sheets, Voice), iCloud, Eufy Security, Tuya, Alexa, Plaud, Canon Print, Canva, OneUp, Zoom



Skills & Qualifications



Required

* Near-native English fluency with a clear, neutral accent

* Confident, professional, and warm phone presence

* Strong communication and rapport-building skills

* Ability to guide conversations and handle objections

* Highly organized, detail-oriented, and dependable

* Tech-savvy and comfortable managing multiple systems simultaneously

* Proficient with Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive)

* Comfortable learning and using EHR systems (OptiMantra experience a plus)

* Ability to work independently without constant supervision

* Reliable high-speed internet (backup connection preferred)



Preferred (Nice-to-Have)

* Experience in healthcare, wellness, acupuncture, or medical office settings

* Experience with OptiMantra or other EHR systems

* Background in patient retention or client success

* Experience with virtual front desk operations

* Familiarity with Canva and social media scheduling tools

* Access to Apple device (iMessage/FaceTime) for clinic communication



What We’re Looking For

You are:

* Warm, empathetic, and patient-centered

* Confident and composed under pressure

* Organized and systems-oriented

* Coachable and open to feedback

* Professional with a strong sense of ownership

* Looking for a long-term role, not a temporary position



How to Apply:



Please submit your application along with a brief video introduction.  *Applications without video introductions will NOT be considered.*



Add 'HEAL' to the subject and answer the following questions:



1. Are you looking for full-time or part-time work?

2, What are your preferred number of hours per week?

3. Are you available on Mondays, Wednesdays and Fridays between 1pm and 7pm?

4. Do you already have another job? If so, where are you working and how many hours are you working?

5. How much money are you looking to make per hour?

6. Have you worked for foreign employers before?

7. When would you be available to start work?

8. Do you have a stable, high-speed internet connection and a reliable computer suitable for video calls and multitasking?

9. Will you work from home or from an Internet café?

10. Are you able to access and download the following on your computer?: iMessage, FaceTime, Hubstaff, Cloud, Eufy Security app, Tuya app, Alexa app, Plaud web, Canon Print, Canva, OneUp, Zoom

If you live and breathe TikTok, Reels, Instagram, and YouTube shorts, then this job is for you. We need a creative social media specialist who understands "hook" culture, fast-paced transitions, and how to make content go viral. Someone who stays ahead of trends and knows exactly which song or effect will make a video pop. Someone who will create and manage engaging content for a luxury villa, turning raw clips into fast-paced, cinematic, high-retention videos.

What I’m Looking For:

• Fast-paced, engaging editing (no boring cuts)

• Strong hook in the first 1–2 seconds

• Smooth, cinematic transitions

• Perfect sync with music and sound effects

• Ability to create curiosity and a luxury feel

Responsibilities:

• Create short-form videos (Instagram/FB Reels, TikTok, Shorts)

• Develop and manage a simple content calendar

• Post and engage with followers and manage our social media pages

• Stay on top of trends

Project Details:

• Starting with 1 video per week 

• Potential for long-term work

• Raw clips/photos will be provided (Google Drive access)

Creative Direction:

• Focus on promoting the villa (especially the complimentary rooftop breakfast) facing Mount Kenya, we only villa that can offer that in the resort

• Style: energetic, fast-paced, cinematic content

• Clean color grading, subtle effects, smooth flow

Requirements:

• Experience with social media content

• Strong video editing skills

• Reliable communication and deadlines

To Apply:

• Share samples of your work (video ads)

• Your price per video

• Brief description of your workflow

title: Division Controller (Remote|Independent Contractor)
description:
Division Controller (Remote|Independent Contractor) 



About Meiborg: 



As an industry leading logistics company, Meiborg provides safe and reliable transportation services to a diverse group of customers throughout the United States. With a reputation of providing only the best in transportation and warehousing, our professional customer support staff deliver the highest levels of efficiency and performance for our customers. 



The Division Controller is responsible for the integrity of the financials, forecast, and budgets over three business units (Meiborg Logistics, Meiborg Warehousing, Enterprise Diesel Solutions).  Duties include working with business unit leaders, driving growth and profitability for each division.  Compiling financial reports based on financial statements and implementing policies and procedures for financial reporting. Ensure that internal controls are in place to protect assets, ensure the integrity of our financial statements, and facilitate the effective operation of all business functions.  



 Essential Responsibilities: 



• Manage all accounting operations for each of the respective business units

• Manage the forecast and budgeting process for each business unit

• Prepare customer mix margin reports vs forecast

• Proforma potential new warehousing buildings and calculate ROI

• Preparing pricing for customer request for pricing using in-house pricing models

• Perform monthly financial close functions and statement preparation

• Ensure quality control over financial transactions and financial reporting

• Perform general ledger analysis and reconciliation 

• Oversee activities to ensure the accurate and timely management of billing 

• Post accruals monthly, quarterly, and yearly  

• Plan and participate in annual financial budget process 

• Weekly ad hoc reporting 

• All other duties and projects as assigned 



Job Requirements: 



• Years of Experience: Minimum 5 years’ accounting and finance experience

• Education: bachelor’s degree, required; master’s degree preferred

• Ability to lead and train others 

• Proven experience as a Controller 

• Accounting managerial experience required 

• Excellent account software user and administration skills 

• Trucking industry experience a plus 

• Excellent verbal and written communication skills 

• CPA and/or other professional certifications  and US GAAP Proficient

• Advanced skills in Microsoft Excel and related accounting software 

• Excellent analytical skills 

• Full-time: 40 hours/week

• Schedule: Monday- Friday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST

• Contractual role (Independent Contractor)

• Ongoing, long-term opportunity based on performance and business needs



Pay: Based on education, experience, and credentials.

 

If you’re interested in applying for the Division Controller position, please send your application to 
 you!

title: Finance Analyst/ Account Analyst
description:
Atrium Housing is a mission-driven real estate development firm focused on creating affordable housing and vibrant communities. Our projects span mixed-finance and LIHTC transactions, and we pride ourselves on delivering high-quality, impactful housing solutions while fostering a collaborative, supportive, and growth-oriented work environment.



At Atrium, you’ll have the opportunity to learn directly from experienced development professionals, work on meaningful projects that impact communities, and build a strong foundation for a career in real estate finance and affordable housing development.



Role Purpose



As a Development Analyst, you’ll support affordable housing transactions through financial underwriting, due diligence coordination, and application support. While LIHTC experience is a plus, it is not required—what matters most is your analytical mindset, attention to detail, and eagerness to learn.



Primary Value You’ll Bring:



* Accurate underwriting and financial modeling

* Organized and reliable diligence tracking

* High-quality application support for housing agencies, investors, and lenders



What You’ll Do



* Build and maintain detailed financial models and sources-and-uses statements (LIHTC exposure is a bonus)

* Prepare rent schedules, operating pro formas, and subsidy layering analyses

* Support preparation of state housing agency applications

* Coordinate third-party reports such as market studies, appraisals, environmental studies, and surveys

* Maintain due diligence and closing checklists

* Assist with investor, lender, and internal memos



What We’re Looking For



Technical Competencies:



* Intermediate to advanced Excel skills (formulas, pivot tables, modeling)

* LIHTC fundamentals (ideal, not required)

* Strong data organization



Behavioral Competencies:



* High attention to detail

* Responsiveness and proactive communication

* Strong accountability and ownership



Qualifications:



* Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Real Estate, Economics, Planning, or related field

* 0–3 years of relevant experience

* Strong analytical and organizational skills

* Performance Metrics

* Accuracy and reliability of underwriting

* Timeliness of deliverables

* Quality and completeness of application materials

* Responsiveness to team and project needs



Why You’ll Love Working at Atrium Housing



* Impactful work: Contribute to projects that provide affordable housing and improve communities.

* Professional growth: Learn from experienced development professionals and gain exposure to mixed-finance and LIHTC projects.

* Collaborative culture: Work with a supportive, mission-driven team where your contributions matter.

* Flexible remote work: Balance your professional growth with personal life while collaborating across time zones.



To apply, answer these questions via vocaroo and send your link.

1. What struck your interest about the role?

2. What's your experience in handling finance especially in the construction industry?

3. Attach the LINK to your updated resume.

title: Freelance Accounts Administrator / Remote VA Contractor
description:
Job Title: Freelance Accounts Administrator / Remote VA Contractor



People Associates is a leading Australasian HR consultancy seeking a highly organised and detail focused freelance contractor to support our accounts administration and client onboarding processes.



This is a remote, work from home contractor role suited to someone who is confident working independently, communicates professionally, and has strong experience with Xero, client invoicing, reconciliations, and administration across multiple systems.



About the role



We are looking for someone to provide reliable accounts and administration support across a mix of direct client work and indirect channel partner accounts. The work includes new client setup, invoicing, reconciliations, and progressing leads through our systems in a timely and accurate way.



You will play an important role in ensuring our client onboarding and accounts processes run smoothly, professionally, and with a high level of care.



Key responsibilities



You will be responsible for:



setting up new clients in Xero Projects

preparing and sending Terms of Engagement to new clients by
 in a polite and professional manner

supporting client onboarding administration

reconciling accounts in Xero

preparing and issuing monthly invoices for direct clients

processing indirect channel partner accounts through Microsoft Dynamics

progressing leads by processing them through Dynamics

sending Terms of Engagement through Dynamics for signing

managing partner invoicing through Dynamics

reconciling partner invoicing with accounts recorded in Projects

maintaining accurate records and ensuring all administration is completed with excellent attention to detail



What we are looking for



The ideal contractor will have:



proven experience in accounts administration, bookkeeping support, or finance administration

strong working knowledge of Xero, including Xero Projects and reconciliations

experience using Microsoft Dynamics, or the ability to learn quickly

confidence handling invoicing across both direct and partner channels

excellent written communication skills, with the ability to write professional and courteous client
s

very strong attention to detail and accuracy

the ability to manage deadlines and work independently from home

reliability and flexibility, particularly around month end, end of week reconciliations, and occasional weekend availability



Availability



This role requires someone who can be available consistently, with particular responsiveness at busy times including:



fortnightly account reconciliations at the end of the week

month end processing

occasional weekend work when required



About People Associates



People Associates is an Australasian HR consultancy known for practical, high quality support across people, culture, leadership, and workplace matters. We work closely with clients and partners and value professionalism, responsiveness, and excellent service.



Contract arrangement



This is a freelance contractor opportunity, fully remote, with flexible work from home arrangements. We are open to discussing availability and capacity with the right person, but reliability during key billing and reconciliation periods is essential. 10 - 15 hours per week depending on volume of work, so good to accompany other work. 



To apply



Please send your CV and a brief summary of your relevant experience, including your experience with Xero, Microsoft Dynamics, invoicing, reconciliations, and remote administration support.

title: Freelance HR Administrator / Remote Contract VA
description:
People Associates is a leading Australasian HR consultancy seeking a highly organised and responsive freelance contractor to provide HR administration support to our consultants.



This is a remote, work from home contractor role suited to someone with strong HR administration experience, excellent written communication skills, and the ability to turn around documentation accurately and efficiently.



About the role



We are looking for a reliable freelance HR Administrator to support our consultants by preparing a range of HR documentation in a prompt, professional, and confidential manner.



A key part of this role is the ability to deliver high quality documentation with a fast turnaround. Ideally, most work would be completed within 24 hours of being requested.



The role is expected to require approximately 10 to 15 hours per week, although this may vary depending on workflow.



Key responsibilities



You will be responsible for preparing and formatting a range of HR and consulting documents, including:



without prejudice meeting invitation letters

disciplinary letters

occupational medical specialist letters

performance improvement plans

other employment relations and HR administration documentation

PowerPoint presentations for consultants and clients

proposal documents and other supporting materials



You will work closely with consultants to ensure documentation is accurate, well presented, and completed within agreed timeframes.



What we are looking for



The ideal contractor will have:



proven experience in HR administration, employment relations administration, or a similar support role

strong document drafting and formatting skills

excellent written English and a professional communication style

strong attention to detail and accuracy

the ability to handle sensitive and confidential information with discretion

confidence producing polished documents in Word and PowerPoint

strong organisational skills and the ability to manage multiple requests at once

the ability to work independently and deliver work quickly, ideally within 24 hours for most requests



Hours and availability



This is a freelance contractor opportunity for approximately 10 to 15 hours per week.



We are looking for someone who can offer flexibility and responsiveness, with availability to complete work promptly as requests arise.



About People Associates



People Associates is an Australasian HR consultancy known for practical, high quality support across people, culture, leadership, and workplace matters. We pride ourselves on being responsive, commercially grounded, and professional in everything we do.



Contract arrangement



This is a remote contractor role with flexible work from home arrangements. It would suit an experienced HR administrator or highly capable VA with relevant experience who is looking for part time freelance work with a professional consulting business.



To apply



Please send your CV and a brief summary of your relevant experience, including your background in HR administration, document preparation, and supporting consultants or senior professionals.

title: Small Business Website Updates
description:
Hi! I'm looking for an experienced WordPress + Elementor developer for a small, straightforward project on my mom's wellness practice website.



This is a simple site — no ecommerce, no complex functionality. I will provide all content and copy. I just need a clean, reliable executor.



---



SCOPE OF WORK



1. New Service Page — Build one new page for a "Spelling to Communicate (S2C)" service. Simple layout, consistent with the existing site design. Content provided.



2. Homepage Update — Redesign the homepage to act as a clear hub with a short intro and two pathway buttons (Homeopathy and S2C) linking to each service.



3. Navigation Menu Fix — Restructure the menu so Homeopathy and S2C clients each have their own section, with sub-items linking to their respective forms.



4. PDF Forms — Upload provided PDF forms and link them in the correct menu locations for easy download.



5. Remove Broken Button — Delete a non-functioning PayPal button.



6. Bonus (nice to have) — Set up a 301 redirect from /programs/ to /homeopathy/ and resubmit the sitemap via Google Search Console.



---



REQUIREMENTS

- Proven experience with WordPress and Elementor (please share examples)

- Reliable communication in English

- Ability to match existing site style

- Available to start soon



---



TO APPLY

Please send:

- Your hourly rate or fixed price estimate for this scope

- 1–2 examples of similar Elementor sites you've built

- Your availability



Looking forward to hearing from you!

mber with strong experience in:

Responsibilities:

- Managing and updating a large catalog (10,000+ SKUs)

Full-time (40 hours/week)

title: Accountant
description:
Remote Accountant Wanted!



Company: Niyyah Edge (
)

Employment Type: Full-Time

About Niyyah Edge



Niyyah Edge is a growing organisation dedicated to delivering high-quality services with integrity, professionalism, and excellence.



We are seeking a highly organised, detail-oriented, and proactive Accountant to manage the financial operations of the business. The successful candidate will ensure accurate financial reporting, compliance, and efficient financial processes that support the company’s growth.

* Manage day-to-day accounting, cash flow and bookkeeping activities

Requirements



Essential:



* Must have strong English in speaking and writing

* Degree or professional qualification in Accounting, Finance, or a related field

* Previous experience in accounting, finance, or financial administration

* Strong organisational skills and high attention to detail

* Experience using accounting software (Xero, QuickBooks, or similar)

* Ability to manage multiple finance responsibilities independently



Preferred:

Why Join Niyyah Edge
