title: Sales VA (Calls + Instagram)
description:
**Title:** Sales VA (Calls + Instagram) | Base + Bonuses (Earn $700 to $900 per month)



We are a premium boutique fitness studio in Houston looking for a full-time **Sales Virtual Assistant** to help us convert leads into paid intro offers.



This is a performance-based role. If you are motivated and follow our system, you can earn well above the base salary.



What You Will Do



* Call new leads within minutes of inquiry

* Send SMS follow-ups to convert leads into purchases

* Respond to Instagram DMs and engage new followers

* Handle inbound calls and guide clients to purchase

* Follow a proven script to sell our intro offer



Your Main Goal



Convert leads into paid intro offers



You are not selling high-ticket memberships.

You are helping people take the first step.



Compensation



* $500 per month (full-time, 40 hours per week)

* $2 per intro sold

* Top performers typically earn $700 to $900 per month



What We Are Looking For



* Strong spoken and written English

* Confident and friendly communication

* Comfortable asking for the sale

* Fast response time (very important)

* Coachable and able to follow scripts

* Reliable and consistent



This Job Is Not For You If



* You are slow to respond to messages

* You do not like talking on the phone

* You wait for instructions instead of taking action

* You avoid asking people to make a decision



This Job Is For You If



* You like hitting targets and goals

* You enjoy talking to people and helping them get started

* You can follow a system and improve quickly

* You want to grow long-term with a company



Important: How to Apply



To be considered, you must follow these steps:



1. Include the word “STRONGER” at the top of your application

2. Answer this question:

   How would you respond to this message?

   “Hi, I’m interested but I need to think about it.”

3. Send a 30-second voice recording introducing yourself



Applications that do not follow instructions will be ignored.



We are looking for someone reliable, motivated, and ready to grow with us long-term.



If that is you, apply now.

title: Looking for experienced inbound SDR
description:
About Us

We build B2B sales systems for clients across Europe using cold
 and LinkedIn outreach. We combine positioning, offer design, and case studies with AI research, personalisation, and automation to generate predictable, high-quality pipeline. We deliver value before we ask for a meeting.



The Role

We're looking for an SDR to convert positive replies from cold
 and LinkedIn into confirmed, qualified meetings. You're not closing deals, your job ends when a qualified decision-maker shows up to a scheduled call. Day-to-day you'll be managing reply inboxes, qualifying interest, handling objections to booking, confirming meetings, and recovering no-shows.



What We Need From You

English C1/C2 - written and spoken, peer-level with C-suite

1-3 years of B2B sales experience with proven results

Experience booking meetings via cold
 and/or LinkedIn (Instantly experience is a plus)

Comfortable making short calls via WhatsApp for warm prospects, confirmations, and no-show recovery

Self-directed - you plan your own day and hit your numbers without being chased

Available to work in CET timezone

Professional home setup: quiet space, camera-ready for internal check-ins

Self-employed and able to invoice



What You'll Be Responsible For

Booking 20+ qualified meetings per month with ICP-matched decision-makers

Sending meeting confirmations within 10 minutes of booking and reminders 1–2 hours before calls

Keeping no-show rate below 20% and rebooking 30%+ of no-shows within 5 days

Completing a qualification brief for every booked meeting before the call

Keeping the CRM fully updated same day, every day

Submitting a weekly pipeline report on time



Key KPIs

20+ qualified attended meetings/month

80%+ show-up rate

Under 30 min response time to prospect replies during working hours

100% of meetings have a completed handoff brief

100% of leads updated in CRM same day



Compensation

Hours: 15-25 hrs/week (part-time to start, scales with results)

Base rate: $2-4/hr (negotiable based on experience)

Commission: $15 per qualified attended meeting booked by you

Estimated OTE: $400–$500/month at part-time hours (no cap on commission)

Invoicing: monthly, paid within 5 business days



60-Day Review

After 60 days we review hours, commission rate, and scope together. If results are strong, full-time is a real possibility.



To Apply

Please include specific examples of meetings you've booked through cold outreach, your average show-up rate if you have it, and a short note on how you manage your day when working remotely without supervision.

title: Klaviyo Specialist
description:
We run a premium decorative lighting brand on Shopify with a global customer base.
 is a core revenue driver and we need the best Klaviyo operator available — not someone good, the best.

If you are still learning Klaviyo, please do not apply. If you have never directly driven significant revenue through
, please do not apply. We are not a training ground and we will not waste each other's time.



You are who we're looking for if:



You have 3+ years owning Klaviyo end-to-end (you built the flows yourself, not supervised someone else)

You can name the exact revenue impact you've had on past brands — percentage of store revenue, recovery rates, CVR lifts

You live inside the data and produce reports without being asked

You have handled deliverability issues, not just avoided them

SMS is part of your toolkit, not something you've "looked into"





The role covers:

Full flow architecture, campaign calendar, segmentation, A/B testing, deliverability, SMS, and weekly revenue reporting. You own the channel. No handholding.



To Apply

Send your application with the subject line: Klaviyo — [Your Name]

Include only these three things:

1. One result. Pick the single best outcome you have driven through Klaviyo. Tell us the brand context, what you built or changed, and the exact numbers before and after.

2. Screenshot or description of your best flow. Show us the structure — triggers, splits, timing, logic. If you can't share a screenshot, describe it in detail. We want to see how you think.

3. Complete this task:



You are given a Klaviyo account for a premium home décor brand on Shopify. The account has 45,000 contacts, a basic welcome series (3
s), an abandoned cart flow (1
), and no other automations.
 currently drives 9% of total store revenue. List open rate is 18?ross all sends.

Write your 90-day action plan. Be specific — name the flows you'd build first and why, how you'd approach segmentation, what you'd fix in deliverability, and what KPIs you'd target by day 30, 60, and 90.

Maximum300 words. Do not write in generalities. We will use this to rank every applicant.



Applications missing any of these three elements will be deleted without response.

title: Amazon Sourcer
description:
ONLINE ARBITRAGE

Looking to grow our team! Seeking one part-time position that will undergo a trial period of one week, paid before being brought on as part-time.



We are more than an Amazon arbitrage (OA) business. If you seek a long-term, advancing position, this is for you.



PSA

We have systems in place to ensure we don’t bring on any bad actors. If you plan on sending us leads that are being shared across other businesses or you are pulling items off of a leads list, you will be let go immediately.



We are seeking a part time product sourcer who can grow in our company and later be promoted to a higher paid managerial role. If you are not a hard worker and can’t prove it to us over our interview process, don’t even bother completing this application.



Job Responsibilities

Tasked with sourcing in-stock 3-6 leads a day.



Follow up, build and maintain SOPs.



Requirements

Keepa experience required

Seller Amp (SAS) experience

Online Arbitrage experience

Familiar with manual, reverse/storefront stalking, keepa product finder

Understanding ROI, margin and sales rank

Ability to work part time (20 hours per week)

Reliable internet Compensation & Benefits

Unlimited PTO

Holidays Off

Bonuses which will be discussed

Communication Skills



This should be simple, we're looking for people who don't need much supervision. Someone that is dependable and eager to work. We know this is a very competitive market and we are looking for a rockstar tea
mber we can rely on for years and years to come. We need someone who pays attention to detail and understands how to properly read data. We expect the majority of the items to be shared with our team to be purchasable and pass all of our SOP checks.  Loyalty is the most important thing to our team. We're looking for people who want to stay with us long term and can see themselves in management /senior roles. If you've read this far, congratulations as I've found out many don't. Please put your favorite fruit as the title of your application.

Furthermore, we will not be accepting any candidates who already work for another client as we need exclusivity. 
 will be required for team communications.



If you want your application expedited please send over 3 leads researched from the same day of your application.

Include Supplier Link & Amazon US link.

This is our criteria.

Low sales rank

Minimum 30% ROI

Keepa chart shows low odds of going below break even price



In addition please answer the following questions in your application submission.

Have you been previously employed to be an online arbitrage sourcer?

If so, why did you leave your current candidate?

How many monitors do you have?

Why should we choose you as one of our candidates?

What is your favorite sport and why ?  

Do you have a Seller Amp and Keepa subscription?



Thanks for taking the time out of your day to apply, best of luck!

title: AI Creative Specialist
description:
The AI Creative Specialist is responsible for producing high-performing AI-generated video content for social media and paid advertising channels, primarily TikTok and Meta 
 / Instagram).



Along with the Creative Director, this role owns the full creative pipeline, from identifying winning creative styles to producing finished, ad-ready video assets.



The role requires a blend of:

- creative research

- scriptwriting

- AI asset generation

- video editing

- performance analysis



The AI Creative Specialist will produce large volumes of creative content, generating up to 50 short-form videos per week, designed for testing and scaling across advertising and organic channels.



Content must be highly realistic, believable, and platform-native, designed to perform in modern short-form video feeds.

The role supports both:



- Paid advertising campaigns

- Organic and affiliate social accounts

1. Creative Research & Trend Analysis

2. Scriptwriting & Story Development

3. AI Asset Creation

4. Video Editing & Production

5. Creative Testing & Iteration

6. Performance Analysis



To apply, please submit 1-2 samples of your best AI generated ads that you personally have made from start to finish. DO NOT send a library or Google drive folder, just your best 1-2. Our focus is on realism, believability and true-to-life UGC.



The wage for this role will be a base rate plus non-capped performance bonuses. Meaning that if your content is good and delivers results, you could earn substantially more.

description:

Your (daily) missions:

Get inspired via Pinterest to understand the visual universe of these niches.



Find similar items on platforms like AliExpress, Temu, and Shein.



Generate realistic and stylish photos according to our methods (we will train you on this) using Gemini AI and ChatGPT.



What we expect from you:



To be autonomous and constantly improving.



To enjoy brainstorming, getting inspired, and immersing yourself in new niches to find the most suitable products.



To be meticulous regarding the quality of the generated photos.



No need to be a design expert: if you know how to use Gemini and have a fashion view on Shein, you already have a big advantage.



Compensation:



$180 per month (7 hours a day).



Paid time off.



Opportunities for growth and evolution.



Conditions:



100% Remote work.



Flexible working hours.



Complete training with ready-to-use processes upon your arrival.



How to apply:

Send a short message explaining:

(Send a cover letter through the platform)



Hello and welcome! My name is Kyoungbu Kang. This is my TikTok channel to understand what I do: 



To move forward, I'd like to invite you to a short test.



This task is designed to test your understanding, your ability to follow instructions, and how well you interpret style and detail — not just basic execution.



Here's the full step-by-step guide for the task (Google Doc):





Here's the video where I explain everything visually:





Important Notes:

– Don't worry if it's not perfect.

– What matters most is that you do your best, follow each step carefully, and show you understand what I'm really looking for.

– If you go a little further or improve a small part: that's a big plus



 About Gemini:

The image generation step requires Gemini with image access (ideally Gemini Pro).

If you don't have Pro, try with the free version — it usually works, but with limitations.

Please let me know right away if you can't generate images, so I can find a solution.



Once you've completed the task, please send everything in one
 or message.



Send me your test by
 (you can use a Google Drive link) and also include your WhatsApp number.



Thanks again, and if your work is perfect for me, we will do a call together to explain what products I'm selling right now, and how to respond and list products on Vinted and Etsy.



There is also a possibility for evolution in salary to $300 per month for a job as a manager if you're good at your job.

title: U.S. Tax Preparer (Seasonal Part-Time ? Year-Round Contractor)
description:
I am seeking an experienced U.S. Tax Preparer to assist with preparation of individual and business tax returns for a boutique U.S. tax practice. The client base includes individuals with international elements and small businesses. Accuracy, confidentiality, and reliability are non-negotiable.



This is not an entry-level bookkeeping role. You must have real experience preparing U.S. federal income tax returns.



Required Experience



You must have hands-on experience preparing the following:



Individual Returns



Form 1040



Form 2555 (Foreign Earned Income Exclusion)



Form 1116 (Foreign Tax Credit)



Form 5471



Form 5472



Form 8938



Schedule C



Schedule D



Schedule E



Form 1040-NR



Business Returns



Form 1065



Form 1120



Form 1120S



You should understand:



Foreign reporting requirements (FBAR familiarity is a plus)



Entity structures (S-corp vs partnership vs C-corp)



Basis tracking and capital accounts



K-1 preparation and reconciliation



If you have not prepared these forms independently, do not apply.



Software Requirements



Preferred experience with:



TaxACT Professional (primary software used)



ATX Tax Software



You must be comfortable learning and working within structured tax workflows and using secure document-sharing systems.



Work Structure

January–April (Tax Season)



Part-time, consistent weekly hours



Ability to meet strict U.S. filing deadlines



Availability for communication during limited overlap with U.S. Eastern Time



May–December



Contractor basis



Ongoing but lighter workload



Project-based assignments



This role is long-term for the right candidate.



Responsibilities



Prepare accurate draft tax returns based on provided client documentation



Identify missing information and communicate clearly what is required



Follow written standard operating procedures



Maintain organized digital workpapers



Flag technical issues or uncertainties instead of guessing



Meet internal deadlines consistently



All returns will be reviewed before filing. Attention to detail is critical.



Required Skills



Strong understanding of U.S. federal income tax law



Excellent English written communication



High attention to detail



Ability to follow instructions precisely



Ability to work independently without constant supervision



Strict confidentiality and professionalism



Preferred Qualifications



Prior experience working with a U.S. CPA or tax firm



PTIN (if applicable)



Familiarity with international tax issues



Experience handling clients with foreign income or foreign corporations



Compensation



Competitive hourly rate based on experience



Rate will reflect demonstrated competence, not claimed experience



Application Instructions



To be considered, please include:



A summary of your direct experience with each of the required forms listed above.



The tax software you have used and for how many years.



Your hourly rate expectation.



Your availability from January through April (hours per week).



A brief description of the most complex U.S. tax return you have prepared.



Applications that do not address these five items will not be reviewed.



This position requires precision, discipline, and accountability. If you take shortcuts or guess when unsure, this role will not be a fit. If you are technically strong and dependable, this can become a stable, long-term engagement.

title: B2B Cold Calling Specialist | Lead Qualification & Discovery Call Booking
description:
We are hiring a part time B2B cold caller to speak with small business owners in the US and UK.



This is not traditional telemarketing.

Leads are pre researched and you will be given:



• a short summary of the business

• the identified issue

• a structured script



Your role is to open a natural conversation, not read a script word for word.



What You Will Do



• Call business owners using our CRM dialer

• Use provided scripts while adapting to the conversation

• Speak clearly, confidently, and professionally

• Handle basic objections without sounding scripted

• Identify interested prospects

• Book calls or escalate strong leads

• Log all call notes in the CRM immediately



Important Requirements



• Fluent, clear English, neutral or American friendly accent

• Ability to understand what you are saying, not just read a script

• Ability to “read the room” and respond naturally

• Experience speaking with business owners

• Quiet working environment

• Reliable internet

• Must be available during agreed US or UK business hours

• Must be comfortable using a CRM dialer



Work Schedule



• Approximately 12 hours per week

• Calls made during agreed calling windows

• Flexible schedule within those hours



Compensation



Base Pay

$6 - 8 hour per hour depending on experience



Performance Bonus

$25 for each qualified discovery call that takes place

Strong performers can earn $400 to $800+ per month part time.



Example

• 12 hours  ($6/hr) worked = $72

• 3 qualified discovery calls completed = $75



Total = $147 for the week



This Role Is NOT For You If:



• You sound robotic or rely heavily on scripts

• You only have basic call centre experience

• You cannot handle objections confidently

• You cannot speak clearly in English

• You work in a noisy environment



Application Requirements



Please include:



Short voice recording introducing yourself



Your cold calling experience



Your availability and timezone



Quick Voice Test (Required)



Record yourself saying:



“Hi Joshua this is [your name].

We recently reviewed your business and noticed something that may be affecting your inbound calls.

Nothing urgent, but I wanted to quickly share what we found.”



Why This Role Is Different



• Leads are pre researched

• You are not calling random businesses

• You will know what to say before the call

• Focus is on conversation, not pressure selling



Hiring Process



• Short interview

• Quick role play

• Fast decision within 24 to 48 hours. Looking to start role asap. 



If you can speak confidently, think on your feet, and handle real conversations, we would like to hear from you.

title: Full time AI video creator
description:
Hiring: AI Content Creation VA (Short-Form Video)



We are a social media content company that creates short-form video content for health and wellness brands on Instagram. We use AI tools to generate images, voiceovers, talking head videos, and motion clips, then edit everything together into finished Instagram Reels.



This is a long-term position, not a one-time project.



What you will be doing:



- Using AI tools to generate realistic images of characters (Nano Banana Pro)

- Generating natural sounding voiceovers (ElevenLabs)

- Creating talking head videos (HeyGen)

- Generating motion video clips (Google Veo 3)

- Editing everything together into polished short-form videos (CapCut or your preferred editing software)

- Using Claude AI to write prompts and improve your work quality



You do not need prior experience with these specific tools. We have a full 9-stage onboarding program that trains you on everything step by step. But you do need to be someone who learns fast and pays attention to detail.



What we are looking for:



- Reliable and consistent. You show up every day and communicate if something comes up. This is the number one thing we care about.

- Detail-oriented. The difference between a good video and a bad one comes down to small details.

- Coachable. You take feedback seriously and apply it to your next video.

- Has their own laptop or desktop computer with a stable internet connection.

- Has their own video editing software (CapCut works great).

- Can follow instructions carefully without needing to be told the same thing twice.



Schedule:



Daily check-in at 9:00 AM PHT. All work for the day must be completed and submitted by 8:00 PM PHT.



Pay:



$500/month.



Onboarding:



Before you start producing content, you will go through our 9-stage onboarding program. This usually takes about 5 days to complete and covers every tool and skill you need. Onboarding is unpaid but mandatory. It is designed to fully prepare you so you can do the job at a high level from day one.



To apply:



Do not just send me a message saying you are interested. To be considered for this position you must complete the following test assignment and include it in your application:




 



Applications without the completed assignment will not be reviewed. This is how we filter for people who actually pay attention and follow instructions.



If you have any questions about the role, include them in your message along with your completed assignment.



Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: MEDIA BUYER — In-house · Full-time · Remote
description:
**Who We Are**



Rogier's Ecom Fzco is a fast-moving direct-to-consumer e-commerce company operating multiple brands across Europe, the US, and beyond. We run paid media at scale across Meta, Google, and Pinterest — and we're building the team that keeps us scaling.



We don't do slow. We test fast, kill fast, and scale what wins.



---



**The Role**



We're hiring a Media Buyer to own performance across our brand portfolio. You're not just managing budgets. You're making daily decisions that directly impact revenue — killing what bleeds, scaling what wins, and staying two steps ahead of the market at all times.



You sit at the center of the operation. Creative, launching, retention — everything flows through you.



---



**What You'll Do**



Daily



- Kill bad ads draining failing campaigns

- Scale winning campaigns ? send action message to team

- Review previous day test results ? send clear pass/fail verdict

- Approve only high-performing creatives before anything goes live

- Confirm launcher checklist is complete

- Keep CRM clean — no killed status without winner tag

- Maintain full overview of what's working across all brands ? generate new ideas



Weekly



- Monday — Prep Tuesday meeting: funnel ideas, winning ad review, unprofitable fixes, KPI check

- Wednesday — Prep Friday meeting: what worked, what didn't, new angles

- Thursday — Full CMO report + winner tagging + hold team accountable on KPIs

- Saturday — Scale priorities + best sellers check across Meta, Google, Pinterest, Taboola

- 2–5 new ad-set concepts tested per winning product

- Google scaling review ? send completion message

- Oversee
 & SMS campaign launches with retention manager



---



**What We're Looking For**



Must-haves



- Minimum 2 years running paid media for DTC e-commerce brands

- Proven Meta Ads experience — testing, scaling, and managing budgets profitably

- Google Shopping experience — feed management, scaling, exclusions

- You understand unit economics — ROAS, margins, and contribution profit

- Fluent English — written and spoken

- Experience working inside a fast-paced remote team



Character



- You make decisions fast and own them

- You think in systems — not one-off fixes

- You hold yourself and your team accountable without being asked

- Highly organized with strong attention to detail

- Coachable but confident — you push back when you have a better answer



---



**This Is NOT For You If:**



- You need someone to tell you what to do every day

- You don't understand e-commerce margins and unit economics

- You can't handle managing multiple brands simultaneously

- You avoid accountability

- You think media buying is just pressing buttons



---



**What You Get**



- $2,500/month — fully remote

- Direct impact on a multi-brand portfolio scaling across Europe and the US

- Work with a lean, high-performance team where results are rewarded

- Fast career growth — this role has a direct line to CMO responsibilities

title: Capcut/Tik-Tok Editor
description:
Editing VA hiring post:



Part-time Capcut / TikTok Editor with potential for more



Hiring for part-time work for a Capcut / TikTok editor



You will be making TikTok videos using Capcup or the video editing software of your choice.  The editing process is fairly simple and straightforward.  Anyone who is proficient in video editing should have no problem with the basic tasks such as:

Cutting dead space in talking head videos

Adding overlay images on screen in the videos

Minor effects such as dynamic zoom, cropping, etc.

Producing b-roll content from voiceover and footage provided, having the ability to digest what is being said and pair up the audio with corresponding footage



Please review a few examples of my content to ensure you are familiar and comfortable with the editing style:

Basic talking head w/ overlays - here you are mostly editing dead space and piecing clips together, adding minor effects like crop and zoom to make the frames look more dynamic and seamless.







Talking head with green/screeen overlays - same as before, but adding images provided to you on the screen to support what is being said in the video. And also being able to green screen my talking content to be used as an overlay









B-roll content - you will be provided a voice over and need to work through the footage to find fitting visuals. A strong understanding of English and social media content is crucial here.









You will be working hand in hand with me on an extremely viral social media page and there is room for bonuses if deadlines are met and the content performs well!



Requirements:

Attention to detail

STRONG English

Strong internet connection

Previous experience with Capcut / TikTok / Instagram

Good working with a team

Ability to learn and take constructive feedback

Availability to work 3-4h a day (with potential for more and increased salary)

Can turn around assignments within a 24 hour time frame

Able to work 6-7 days per week (can take days off whenever as long as mostly consistent)

Can take payments through Wise

PH or similar time zone



$300/month + bonuses for 2-3h a day MAX and potential full time work in the future with a 

salary increase.



To apply, please complete the recreate assignment below so I can see your skills (1h max)



Below is a Google drive with the original files you will need to re-create this reference video:



Reference video: 



Google drive: 



Video Instructions







Please complete the following steps:

Download the files and import into your video editing software

WATCH THE LOOM

Find the “good” takes of the audio sections and stitch together to complete the voiceover

Find the corresponding footage to match what is being said in the voiceover

Pay close attention to detail in the selection of the clips, the pacing (duration of each scene), cropping, etc.

title: Children's Book illustrator
description:
Hello,



I hope you are well.



I am currently working on a children’s book titled David and Goliath: Be Brave When You Feel Small, and I am looking for a skilled illustrator/designer to bring this project to life.



The book is intended for children ages 4–8 and will be published on Amazon KDP.



???? Project Scope:



Approximately 20–22 illustrated pages



Consistent character design throughout



Soft, vibrant, child-friendly illustration style



Biblical setting (warm, Middle Eastern tone)



Final formatting for Amazon KDP (8.5 x 8.5 inches)



???? Important Requirements:



No text embedded in images



High resolution (300 DPI)



Print-ready PDF output



Clean, professional layout



Ability to maintain consistency across all pages



???? Before proceeding, I would like to:



Review your portfolio (children’s books preferred)



Request one sample illustration (paid) based on a scene from the book



Understand your timeline and full project cost



???? Sample Scene (for test illustration):



David standing bravely with a sling, facing the giant Goliath in the distance. The scene should highlight the contrast in size while keeping the tone child-friendly and inspiring (not scary).



If this project is a good fit for you, I would be happy to discuss further.



I am looking for someone who can deliver high-quality, consistent, and engaging illustrations suitable for a bestselling children’s book.



Thank you, and I look forward to hearing from you.



Kind regards,

Cardenise Rodgers

title: Full-Time YouTube Travel Video Editor (Premiere + After Effects) – Long-Term
description:
We are hiring a full-time YouTube video editor for a fast-growing travel channel similar in style to Luke Damant, Drew Binsky, and cinematic adventure vlog content.



This is a long-term position.



We are NOT looking for basic cutting. We are looking for someone who understands pacing, storytelling, and audience retention.



About the channel:

We film travel content in Mexico and around the world. Videos range from 15–60 minutes and focus on real experiences, interactions, and storytelling.



This role requires someone who can:

• Turn raw footage into a compelling story

• Remove unnecessary or repetitive 
nts

• Maintain strong pacing throughout the video

• Keep the viewer engaged at all times



Responsibilities:

• Edit 4–6 long-form travel videos per month

• Cut footage for strong pacing and engagement

• Add subtitles for key dialogue

• Add basic After Effects graphics (maps, overlays, titles)

• Choose music and match energy of scenes

• Remove unnecessary footage and repetition

• Organize project files cleanly

• Export videos ready for YouTube



Requirements:

• Strong Adobe Premiere Pro skills

• Basic to intermediate After Effects

• Fluent English (very important)

• Reliable and responsive communication

• Ability to meet deadlines

• Understanding of YouTube editing and viewer retention



Compensation:

$1,000/month full-time



IMPORTANT:



To apply, you MUST include the word RIVIERA at the top of your application.



Also include:



Portfolio or sample edits

A short video (1 minute) introducing yourself in English



?? The video MUST be made specifically for this job.



In your video, please:

• Address Kreativ Media Partners directly

• Explain your experience with YouTube editing

• Explain how you approach pacing and audience retention

• Mention your favorite YouTube travel creator AND favorite YouTuber in general and why



Generic or copy-paste application videos will NOT be considered.



We are building a long-term team and looking for someone who wants to grow with us.



Applications that do not follow instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Claude AI Expert for Ad Research & High-Converting Recruiting Ads (Life Insurance Niche)
description:
Overview



I’m a life insurance agent scaling a team by recruiting high-ticket sales professionals (setters & closers).



I’m looking for a Claude Code expert who can combine:



AI-powered research

Marketing strategy

Ad creative development



Your role is to identify, analyze, and replicate winning ads—then turn them into high-converting recruiting ads tailored to my niche.



This is NOT a basic VA role. I’m looking for someone who can think, analyze, and build systems.



What You’ll Be Doing

Use Claude (with code capabilities) to:

Research ads across platforms (Meta, TikTok, YouTube, Google)

Analyze large volumes of ads and extract patterns

Break down winning ads into:

Hooks

Messaging

Offers

Emotional triggers

Identify what makes ads perform and why

Create:

Short-form video ad scripts (TikTok / Reels style)

Written ad copy

Multiple hook variations for testing

Continuously improve ads based on findings and performance

Requirements (MUST HAVE)

Strong experience using Claude AI with code capabilities

You understand how to use Claude beyond basic prompting

You can analyze, structure, and extract insights from data

Strong understanding of:

Direct response marketing

High-converting ad creatives

Ability to:

Think critically and identify patterns (not just generate content)

Strong English writing skills

BONUS (Highly Preferred)

Experience with:

Meta Ads Library / TikTok Creative Center

Recruiting ads or high-ticket sales ads

Insurance, finance, or opportunity-based marketing

Experience with n8n (or similar tools like Zapier / Make)

Ability to build workflows that automate ad research and analysis

Basic coding or scripting experience (Python, APIs, scraping tools)

Experience building repeatable AI + automation systems

Compensation

Competitive (based on experience)

Performance-based bonuses tied to ad results

Opportunity for long-term growth

To Apply



Please include ALL of the following:



Examples of your work (ads, copy, or AI workflows)

A short Loom video (2–3 minutes) explaining:

How you would use Claude Code to find and analyze winning ads

Describe ONE workflow you would build using Claude (and n8n if applicable) to improve ad performance

Share one ad you think is currently “winning” and explain why



Who This Is Perfect For



Someone who:



Knows how to use AI as a research and analysis engine

Can combine technical skills + marketing thinking

Enjoys reverse-engineering what makes ads work

Wants to build systems—not just complete tasks



If you understand both AI systems AND marketing psychology, this role is for you.

title: Media Quality and Delivery Specialist VA
description:
DEPARTMENT: Project Coordination

REPORTS TO: CEO

WORK HOURS, PART TIME: 9AM-12PM, 8PM-10PM Mountain Time or similar

STARTING SALARY: $5 per hour

POTENTIAL SALARY: $600-$800 / Month



SUMMARY

We’re looking for someone smart, organized, and excited to grow with us! If you’re a positive, detail-oriented person who loves to learn, takes feedback well, and wants to be part of a close-knit, supportive team, we’d love to meet you.

This is a long-term role for someone who’s ready to take on more responsibility over time and become a key part of our journey.



Who We Are:

Chelwood Media is a woman-run real estate media company based in Utah. We create amazing photo and video content for realtors, and we’re known for our fast turnaround, friendly service, and high-quality work. Our team is growing quickly, and we’re passionate about doing great work and loving the team we work with.

If you’re looking for a place where your ideas matter, you’ll be supported, and you can grow, this might be the perfect fit.



Job Summary

Manage, review for quality, upload, and retouch photos and video on a daily basis. Follow up with the editing team on project status. Maintain communication with the admin team.



RESPONSIBILITIES

Project Management

Send out projects before 12 PM Mountain Time

Quality Control for Deliverables (Photos, Videos, 3D Tours)

Make edits to photos in photoshop/lightroom as needed

Make edits to Videos as needed

Communicate with Admin team on deliveries



SKILLS AND QUALIFICATIONS

Ability to take on several tasks at once.

EXTREME attention to detail.

Excellent English speaking and written.

Customer Relationship Management (CRM) software experience.

Proficient in Canva, Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Lightroom, Slack.

Preferred proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro/Final Cut Pro/Capcut.

Fast learner and willing to learn



INSTRUCTION TO APPLY

To be considered, please do all of the following: 

 
 your resume, internet speed, and a video recording of you answering the following four questions:

Please tell us about yourself, what do you love?

Please detail your past work experience and how it relates to this job at Chelwood Media. Why do you believe you would be a great candidate for this position?

Do you have leadership or management experience?

title: Video Editor Viral Short-Form Content / Reels - TikTok - YouTube Shorts
description:
We are a creative media team working on two exciting projects: the launch campaign of an emerging music

artist and the promotional campaign for a feature film releasing in October. We are looking for talented

Filipino video editors who understand what makes content go viral on Western social media platforms and

can produce high-quality short-form videos consistently.



What you will be working on



You will edit short-form videos for two distinct campaigns running simultaneously:



MUSIC CAMPAIGN

Pairing songs of a new artist with fitting video clips

– animal footage, anime edits, epic cinematic

scenes, landscapes, emotional moments. 



The goal: organic virality that puts the music in

people's heads.





FILM CAMPAIGN

Creating appetite-building clips from film footage –

suspenseful cuts, emotional hooks, engaging

subtitles – designed to make people curious and

talk about the film before its October release 2026 in all german cinemas and on Netflix.





What we are looking for



? Strong instinct for what makes content go viral on Western platforms (TikTok US/EU,

Instagram, YouTube Shorts)



? Proficiency in at least one professional editing tool (CapCut, Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci

Resolve, Final Cut Pro, or similar)



? Good PC/laptop and reliable internet connection – you must be able to handle video files and

deliver on time



? Ability to follow creative briefs and direction closely while bringing your own creative sense to

the execution



? Good English comprehension – you will receive instructions and feedback in English



? Available 4–6 hours per day, on a consistent schedule, for a duration of several months



Nice to have

Experience creating viral content yourself · Knowledge of current trends on Western TikTok /

Instagram Reels · Skills in subtitle styling and motion typography · Portfolio or examples of past edits

Compensation



Base rate: €4 EUR / hour 



Rate is performance-based and can go higher or lower depending on

quality, consistency, and results. 

Strong performers will be rewarded.



We are looking for a long-term working relationship, not a one-off.



Selection process

Shortlisted candidates will be invited to a practical editing test: we will send you raw video material

and a brief set of instructions. You will independently create a short-form video from this footage

according to our guidelines. This test is how we evaluate your instinct, creativity, and ability to follow

direction – no lengthy interviews, just your work speaking for itself.



How to apply

1. A short introduction – who you are, your editing background, and which tools you use

2. At least 2–3 examples of your video editing work (links to YouTube, TikTok, Google Drive, etc.)

3. Your available hours per day and time zone

4. Your PC specs and which editing software you currently use



We are actively looking for young, hungry talent who genuinely understand social media and want to grow

with us. If you have the eye and the drive, we want to hear from you

title: Cinematic Birthday Film (5–6 min) with English Voice Narration – Documentary Style
description:
Cinematic Birthday Film (5–6 min) with English Voice Narration – Documentary Style



Description:



I am looking for an experienced video editor to create a 5–6 minute cinematic documentary-style film for a formal 70th birthday event.



This video will be shown at the beginning of a banquet function, so it must be high quality, emotionally engaging, and professionally polished.



Project Overview:



The film will tell a life story using:

- Curated family photos

- Travel & adventure photos

- Historical/early life images

- A few short video clips



I will provide:

- A complete narration script (English)

- Organized photos and video files

- General structure and guidance



IMPORTANT – Voice Narration Required:



The final video must include:

- Professional English voice-over narration

- Clear, warm, documentary-style tone

- Proper pacing with pauses for emotional impact



Please confirm if you:

- Provide voice-over yourself

OR

- Work with a voice artist



Style & Expectations:



This is NOT a simple slideshow.



I am looking for:

- Cinematic storytelling (documentary style)

- Smooth pacing and emotional flow

- Subtle transitions (no flashy effects)

- Slow zoom (Ken Burns style)

- Clean, elegant text overlays

- Music synced with narration

- Proper use of silence and timing



Music:

- Cinematic instrumental (royalty-free)

- Emotional but not overly dramatic



Deliverables:

- Final video in MP4 format (1080p or 4K)

- Optimized for large screen / banquet hall playback

- Voice narration included and synced

- One preview version + revisions before final



Timeline:

- Prefer delivery within 5–7 days



Tone:

Balanced:

- Elegant

- Emotional

- With some light joyful moments



To Apply, Please Include:



1. 2–3 samples of similar work (family film, wedding, documentary, tribute video)

2. Sample of voice-over narration (very important)

3. Editing software used (Premiere Pro, After Effects, etc.)

4. Estimated cost and turnaround time



Bonus (Optional):

I may request a short 20–30 second sample edit using my photos before final selection.



Budget:

Open to proposals (fixed price preferred)



Note:

This is a meaningful personal project, so attention to detail and storytelling is very important.

title: SEO Content Creator (High-Quality, Publish-Ready Articles)
description:
I’m looking for a skilled SEO content creator to join my team.



This is not a basic writing job.



I need someone who understands SEO properly and can turn a simple keyword into a high-quality, fully optimised article that is ready to publish (I'll teach you how to write content briefs that rank on Google for my audience which is in New Zealand).



?? IMPORTANT – READ THIS FIRST



To be considered for this role, your application must include the secret word found in this job post.



If you do not include the secret word, your application will be ignored.



Also:



You must have at least 10 application points

If you have less than 10, you will not be considered

The more application points you have, the higher your chances of getting hired



There will also be a quick 30-minute trial task to confirm your skills.



Here's what You’ll Be Doing:



Your main role will be creating high-quality SEO content for my website.



The goal is simple:



I give you a keyword.

You give me a finished article.



For example:



Keyword: AI SEO



You produce a complete article that includes:



Proper SEO structure (H1, H2, H3)

Strong keyword targeting

Clean formatting

Internal linking

High-quality, relevant images

Image alt text

Well-written, engaging content

Supporting stats, studies, or credible sources



The ideal outcome is:



A publish-ready article that I can quickly review and upload.



What Success Looks Like



Within 1–2 months, you are able to take a core keyword and turn it into a fully SEO-optimised, high-quality, publish-ready article with minimal input fro
.



That means:



I give you a keyword

You handle everything else



A successful article includes:



Clear structure (H1, H2, H3)

Strong keyword targeting and search intent alignment

High-quality explanations (not surface-level content)

Step-by-step, actionable processes

Real examples

Screenshots where relevant

Supporting statistics and credible sources

Internal linking

Clean formatting



The standard is simple:



Your content should match or exceed the quality of the articles I’ve already published.



The goal is to produce some of the best digital marketing / SEO content in New Zealand.



Additional Expectations



Within that same 1–2 month period, you should also:



Be confident creating content briefs (I will show you the process)

Be handling digital PR / link building
 responses daily

Require minimal hand-holding



What You Need to Be Good At

Writing high-quality SEO content using Elementor

Understanding search intent

Creating content briefs (which I'll teach you how to do)

Formatting content properly

Adding internal links strategically

Finding and including relevant statistics or studies

Basic on-page SEO best practices



If you’ve only done basic blog writing with no SEO behind it, this role is not for you.



Do NOT Apply If

You rely heavily on AI without properly editing

You don’t understand SEO (not just writing)

You miss small details or instructions

You miss the secret word: ice-cream

You need constant supervision



Application Requirements



To be considered, you must include:



The secret word

Links to 2–3 of your best SEO articles

A short explanation (max 150 words) of how you approach SEO content

Give me how long it'll take to produce one piece of high-quality content comparable to mine (total hours worked I mean - e.g. 4 hours total for one article)



Pay & Growth

Starting rate: 210 PHP per hour

Around 20 hours per week



For the right person, there is strong growth potential.



My goal is to increase your pay over time, and ideally double it as the company grows and you prove consistent high-quality work.



If you produce great work, you will be taken care of.



Quality Standard



Here are examples of the type of content I expect:











If this sounds like you,apply now.

title: Senior Short-Form Video Editor
description:
Job Role: Senior Short-Form Video Editor



APPLICATION FORM: 



**Note: While we are looking to fill a full-time role as the primary objective, we are also looking for contract/freelance video editors as well to assist with overflow work as well. Please state which applies to you in your application.



Work Schedule: While initially this role would be per-job basis, moving into a retainer once we are both happy and potentially even into a full time role, some overlap with Brisbane time frame is appreciated.



We are looking for an experience short-form video editor to join our team. You will be working closely with our Social Media Management team to produce high quality, short form reels which engage, educate, entertain and inspire.



A deep understanding of social media content, pacing, hooks and retention techniques as well as overall creativity will be paramount in this role. You will need to be able to follow a brief and client guidelines as well as know when it's ok to do something a little different in order to get the best results.



You will also be somewhat of a "Creative Director" in that we will also be relying on you to set the standards for creativity for each client, by understanding their brand and seeing it as what it could be and provide new ideas.



Please see some examples of the type of work we do and what you will be working on: 



A bit about us: 



A dynamic creative marketing agency located in Brisbane, that focuses on crafting compelling content, producing videos, managing social media, and developing brand strategies to help businesses communicate their message. Built on the idea that thoughtful storytelling creates real impact, the team emphasizes creativity, innovation, and a collaborative, supportive workplace culture.



Role Overview: 



We're looking for a Senior Short-Form Video Editor to join this Brisbane-based creative agency specialising in content creation and social media management for B2B and service-based businesses.



In this role, you'll transform raw footage into scroll-stopping Instagram Reels, TikToks, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn videos. You'll work across multiple client brands, delivering high-volume, high-quality content that drives real engagement and results.



You'll report to the Social Media Manager and collaborate closely with our Social Media Coordinator, Senior Video Editor, and Videographer. We provide all software, storage, and systems — you bring the talent and your own editing workstation.



What Success Looks Like:



Consistently producing platform-native video content that looks like it belongs on each client's feed — not like it came from a template factory. You nail the hook in the first 3 seconds, maintain energy throughout, and deliver clean endings that leave viewers satisfied.



You hit deadlines reliably, flag issues early, and require minimal revisions because you've internalised each client's brand guidelines. Your 18th video of the week looks as sharp as your 1st.



This role suits editors who bring creative flair while thriving within defined processes. You're not just executing — you're injecting energy, personality, and storytelling craft into every edit.



What You'll Do:



- Edit short-form videos (30-90 seconds) from raw footage including podcasts, interviews, events, and B2B content

- Apply retention editing techniques: pattern interrupts, dynamic pacing, strategic zooms, visual hooks

- Create burnt-in captions with accurate timing, spelling, and brand-consistent styling

- Build motion graphics elements: lower thirds, callouts, kinetic text, animated transitions

- Export multiple versions per video (9:16, 1:1, 4:5) and custom thumbnails as required

- Maintain brand consistency across high-volume batch production

- Follow established workflows using ClickUp (project management) and Dropbox (footage & review)



Requirements:



- 3+ years professional video editing experience

- Expert proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro and/or DaVinci Resolve

- Strong proficiency in Adobe After Effects

- Intermediate to expert motion graphics skills (lower thirds, kinetic text, animated elements)

- Proven portfolio showcasing short-form social video content (Reels, TikToks, Shorts)

- Strong understanding of retention editing and platform-specific pacing

- Caption creation expertise with excellent spelling and grammar

- Audio editing fundamentals (levels, EQ, noise reduction)

- Basic colour correction skills

- Excellent written and spoken English

- Own workstation suitable for video editing (multi-core processor, 16GB+ RAM, dedicated GPU, SSD storage)

- Reliable high-speed internet connection



Nice to Have:



-Advanced colour grading capabilities



What We Offer:



- Full-time, stable position with an established creative agency

- All software provided (Adobe Creative Cloud, DaVinci Resolve, etc.)

- Storage drives provided - Initially we will need you to provide your own hard drives etc however long term we would deliver you a NAS.

- Work across diverse client brands in property, professional services, hospitality, trades, allied health and more

- Clear processes and brand guidelines — no guesswork

- Supportive team environment with weekly check-ins



Work Arrangement & Expectations:



- This is a remote role that will be set up via an Employer of Record (EOR) service.

- To ensure alignment and transparency, successful candidates will be expected to:

- Be available for meetings and collaboration during core [AEST] business hours

- Disclose any existing ongoing roles or client work



If you think this job could suit you, please apply using the form below so we can ensure a streamlined experience for both parties.



APPLICATION FORM: 



Thank you and we look forward to hearing from you!

title: Senior Graphic Designer
description:
Graphic Designer – Social Media & Presentations

Remote | Australian Creative Agency | Philippines Preferred

Full-time for the right person, however we will also consider ongoing freelance arrangements with an ongoing retainer/agreed work per month.



APPLICATION FORM: 



Hey there!



We're a creative agency that helps businesses tell their stories through photography, videography, social media, and Meta advertising. We've been around since 2017 and currently manage growing retainer client base across B2B and service-based industries.



We're looking for a Graphic Designer to join our team and take ownership of our visual design output — both the social media content we create for clients and the internal materials that represent our own brand.



Being able to adapt/enhance a client's existing brand is also important. Some clients come to us with excellent brand playbooks and assets, others have a font and a logo and then it's up to us to get creative with it. So someone who who can develop the brand is important too.



If you're someone who takes real pride in clean, polished design work, can manage multiple brands without mixing them up, and can make a pitch deck look like it belongs in a boardroom — keep reading.



What You'll Actually Be Doing:



Client Social Media Design (the majority of your time):



- Designing carousels, static posts, video thumbnails, and story assets for our retainer clients across Instagram,
, and LinkedIn

- Working within established brand guidelines for each client — you'll manage multiple brand identities simultaneously

- Receiving briefs through ClickUp and delivering designs for internal review before they go to the client

- Maintaining visual consistency across each client's content so their feed looks intentional, not random



Internal & Agency Design:



- Updating and designing our pitch decks and proposals — these are what we use to win new clients, so they need to look sharp

- Creating and formatting strategy presentations and content plans for client delivery

- Designing internal templates, one-pagers, capability statements, and other brand collateral

- Producing social media content for Narrative Hub's own channels

- Refining the visual format of our monthly client reports



The Tools You'll Work With:



- Canva (Pro): Our preferred tool for day-to-day social media designs. Many clients have existing Canva templates that you'll build on and maintain. We're flexible on tools as long as the quality is there and revisions can be turned around quickly.

- Adobe Creative Suite: Illustrator, Photoshop, and InDesign for more complex work — pitch decks, detailed presentations, advanced graphics, and anything that needs precision layout. We need you to be genuinely proficient here, not just familiar.

- ClickUp: Where all briefs, feedback, time tracking, and task management lives. This is our central hub.

- Dropbox: File storage and sharing for all working files and final deliverables.

- PowerPoint / Google Slides: For presentation design and formatting as needed.

- We provide all software subscriptions (Adobe, Canva Pro, etc.), Dropbox storage, and ClickUp access. You provide your own hardware and a reliable internet connection.



What We're Looking For



Must-haves:



- 3+ years of professional graphic design experience, ideally in an agency or managing multiple brand accounts

- Strong portfolio showing social media design work — carousels, static posts, branded content

- Experience designing presentations and pitch decks to a high standard

- Proficient in both Canva and Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign)

- Solid understanding of typography, layout, visual hierarchy, and brand application

- Detail-oriented — you notice when spacing is off, a colour is wrong, or a font doesn't match

- Clear written communication in English

- Comfortable with feedback and revisions — it's part of the process, not a personal critique



Good to have:



- Experience working with Australian businesses or in a similar time zone

- Familiarity with social media platform specs and best practices (image sizes, safe zones, etc.)

- Experience with B2B or service-based brands specifically



What You Won't Be Doing



Just to set expectations:



- No video editing (we have dedicated editors for that)

- No social media scheduling or community management

- No photography or videography

- No website design or development

- No Meta ad campaign management



You won't be expected to write copy, but you may need to take our briefs and alter them to suit the designs. If you are very capable at copywriting, we will be happy for you to assist with writing copy for these posts as well, however it won't be necessary.



How We Work



You'll have a dual reporting structure:



- Social Media Manager/Coordinator: manages your day-to-day client work — they'll brief you, review your designs, and keep you aligned with content calendars

- Managing Director: will brief you directly on all internal work — pitch decks, proposals, strategy presentations, and internal branding.

- The Social Media Coordinator will also work closely with you on content calendar alignment and design briefs.



Our process is straightforward:



- You receive a brief in ClickUp with all the details — client, content type, messaging, brand assets

- You design, tracking your time in ClickUp as you go

- Internal review (1 round) — Social Media Manager or Coordinator for client work, MD for internal work.

- Client approval (1 round) — managed by the Social Media Manager

- Final files exported and saved to Dropbox, ready for scheduling

- If a brief is unclear, we expect you to ask before you start — not after you've completed a draft.



The Details



Location: Remote — Philippines-based candidates preferred

Employment Type: To be confirmed (may be full-time via EOR or contract)

Hours: Minimum 6–8 hours overlap with Brisbane business hours (9am–5pm AEST)

Communication: ClickUp for tasks and feedback, ClickUp Chat for quick questions and check-ins

Start Date: TBC



Interested?



- If this sounds like a good fit, we'd love to hear from you. In your application, please share fill out the below form so we can assess your application:



APPLICATION FORM: 



Please be sure to include in the form:



- A link to your portfolio (or a few examples of your best social media design and presentation work)

- A brief overview of your experience — especially if you've worked in an agency or managed multiple brands

- Which tools you're most comfortable in (Canva, Adobe Suite, or both) and how you typically approach a design brief

- Any other information it asks for



Thank you and we wish you the best with your application!
